# Project: Patient Preferred Language And Deep Sedation During Invasive Mechanical Ventilation: A Multicenter Retrospective Cohort Study
# Author: Alex Ortiz

# Setup Step - Setup libraries
```{r setup}
# Install Packages

packages <- c("zoo", "data.table", "dplyr", "lubridate", "tidyr", "fst", "arrow", "table1", "lme4", "metafor", "yaml", "pscl", "MASS", "htmltools", "car", "WeightIt", "MatchIt", "purrr", "survival", "mediation", "cmprsk", "gfoRmula", "nnet", "medflex", "bruceR", "tidyverse", "survey", "ipw", "geepack", "readr", "collapse", "stringr", "rprojroot")
install_if_missing <- function(package) {
  if (!require(package, character.only = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(package, dependencies = TRUE)
    library(package, character.only = TRUE)
  }
}
 
sapply(packages, install_if_missing)

# Load necessary libraries
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(zoo)  # for na.locf function
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(fst)
library(arrow)
library(table1)
library(metafor)
library(yaml)
library(htmltools)
library(MASS)
library(pscl)
library(car)
library(stringr)
library(rprojroot)
library(jsonlite)

# Read the YAML from the config folder
project_root <- file.path( find_root(rprojroot::has_dir("deep_sedation_language_final")),
  "deep_sedation_language_final")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = file.path(project_root, "config"))
config <- yaml::read_yaml(file.path(project_root, "config", "deep_sedation_language_config.yaml"))

# Define directories based on YAML configuration
data_dir <- config$data_dir
local_dir <- config$local_dir
output_dir <- file.path(local_dir, "output/")
intermediate_dir <- file.path(local_dir, "intermediate_data_DO_NOT_UPLOAD/")  # Define output_dir based on data_dir
final_data_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "FINAL_DATA_UPLOAD_ME/")
cohort_characteristics <- file.path(final_data_dir, "cohort_characteristics")
sedation_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "sedation_project")
sedation_tables_dir <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_tables/")
sedation_final_data <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_data/")
paralytics_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "paralytics_project")
paralytics_tables_dir <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_tables/")  
paralytics_final_data <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_data/")
file_type <- config$file_type
institution <- config$institution
time_zone <- config$time_zone

dirs_to_create <- c(output_dir, intermediate_dir, final_data_dir, sedation_project, sedation_tables_dir, sedation_final_data, paralytics_project, paralytics_tables_dir, paralytics_final_data, cohort_characteristics)
for (dir in dirs_to_create) {
  if (!dir.exists(dir)) {
    dir.create(dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
}
```

#Fix Hospitalization
```{r}
read_data_start <- function(file_path, select = NULL) {
 # 1) load into dt rather than return immediately
  if (grepl("\\.csv$|\\.csv\\.gz$", file_path)) {
    dt <- fread(file_path, select = select)
  } else if (grepl("\\.parquet$", file_path)) {
    if (is.null(select)) {
      dt <- arrow::read_parquet(file_path)
    } else {
      dt <- arrow::read_parquet(file_path, col_select = all_of(select))
    }
  } else if (grepl("\\.fst$", file_path)) {
    if (is.null(select)) {
      dt <- fst::read_fst(file_path)
    } else {
      dt <- fst::read_fst(file_path, columns = all_of(select))
    }
  } else {
    stop("Unsupported file format. Only CSV, Parquet, and FST are supported.")
  }
  
      # Find all datetime variables containing 'dttm'
  datetime_vars <- names(dt)[grepl("dttm", names(dt))]
  
  local_tz = time_zone
  print(local_tz)
  
  # Check and convert datetime variables
  for (var in datetime_vars) {
    
    # Check if its death_dttm might be a date (if it's still not POSIXct)
    if (var == "death_dttm" & !inherits(dt[[var]], "POSIXct")) {
      # Try converting it to datetime at 11:59 PM
      dt[[var]] <- ymd(dt[[var]]) + hours(23) + minutes(59)
      
      # This forces tz to local timezone instead of assume it was previously UTC
      dt[[var]] <- as.POSIXct(dt[[var]])
      dt[[var]] <- force_tz(dt[[var]], tzone = local_tz)

      # Attempt to parse datetime using a common format, adjust based on your actual format
      dt[[var]] <- ymd_hms(dt[[var]], quiet = TRUE)
      print(var)
      print(paste("✅", var, "converted to 23:59 in", local_tz, "without time shift"))

      if (!inherits(dt[[var]], "POSIXct")) {
        
        dt[[var]] <- as.POSIXct(dt[[var]], tz = local_tz)
        
        # Attempt to parse datetime using a common format, adjust based on your actual format
        dt[[var]] <- ymd_hms(dt[[var]], quiet = TRUE)
        
        
        # Check if it just turned things into NA
        if (is.na(ffirst(dt[[var]], na.rm = TRUE))) {
          stop(paste("Conversion failed for:", var,"\n",
                     "\nPlease look at your clif data for   ", var, 
                     "\nmake sure its POSIXct format!!"))
          
          
          # Check if conversion failed (if it's still not POSIXct)
          if (!inherits(dt[[var]], "POSIXct")) {
            stop(paste("Conversion failed for:", var,"\n",
                       "\nPlease look at your clif data for   ", var, 
                       "\nmake sure its POSIXct format!!"))
          }        
          
        }
        
      }
    } else {
    # If it's already POSIXct, leave it alone
    next
  }
    
    print(paste("Nice!",var,"is in the correct dttm format!!"))
  }
    # Join with cohort data and glimpse the result
  dt %>% glimpse()

  return(dt)
}


clif_hospitalization_start <- 
  read_data_start(paste0(data_dir, "clif_hospitalization", file_type)) |> 
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm, age_at_admission, patient_id, 
         # admission_type_name, 
         # admission_type_category, 
         discharge_name, discharge_category) |> 
  # unfactor things to ensure everything is lowercase
  mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character)) |> 
  # get everything to lower
  mutate(across(where(is_character), str_to_lower)) 

# Create an Hospital Block ID - This is to Identify Continuous Hospitalizations When Patients Are Transferred Between Hospitals in One Health System
# This code is intended be robust to various ways encounters may be coded in CLIF databases
hospital_blocks <- clif_hospitalization_start |> 
  dplyr::select(patient_id, hospitalization_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm) |>
  arrange(patient_id, admission_dttm) |>
  collect()

# Identify Admissions That Occur Within 3 Hours of a Discharge (Will Consider Those Linked and as Part of One Continuous Encounter)
linked_encounters <- setDT(hospital_blocks)
#Create a Variable for the time of the next admission and time of previous discharge
linked_encounters[, ':=' (next_admit_dttm = data.table::shift(admission_dttm, n=1, type = "lead")), by = patient_id]
linked_encounters[, ':=' (prev_dc_dttm = data.table::shift(discharge_dttm, n=1, type = "lag")), by = patient_id]
#Calculates Time Between Discharge and Next Admit
linked_encounters[, next_diff_time := difftime(next_admit_dttm, discharge_dttm, units = "hours")]
linked_encounters[, prev_diff_time := difftime(admission_dttm, prev_dc_dttm, units = "hours")]

#Now Create Variable Indicating a Linked Encounter (next_admit-dc time <6 hours or prev_dc-admint <6 hours)
linked_encounters[, linked := fcase(
  (next_diff_time <6 | prev_diff_time <6), 1)]
#Filter to Only Linked Encounters and number them
linked_encounters <- linked_encounters[linked==1]
#This Identifies the First Encounter in a Series of Linked Encounters
linked_encounters[, first_link := fcase(
  (rowid(linked)==1 | (next_diff_time<6 & prev_diff_time>6)), 1
), by = patient_id]

#Now Numbers Encounters, easier in dplyr
#Filter to Just First Links, Number them and then Remerge with linked encounters
temp <- as_tibble(linked_encounters) |>
  filter(first_link==1) |>
  group_by(patient_id) |>
  mutate(link_group=row_number()) |>
  ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, link_group) 
linked_encounters <- as_tibble(left_join(linked_encounters, temp)) |>
  fill(link_group, .direction = c("down")) |>
  #Create a Variable Indicating Which Number of LIinked Encounter the Encounter is
  group_by(patient_id, link_group) |>
  mutate(link_number=row_number()) |>
  ungroup() |>
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, linked, link_number)
rm(temp)

#Now Join Back to Hospitalization Table
clif_hospitalization_start <- clif_hospitalization_start |>
  left_join(linked_encounters) |>
  mutate(linked=if_else(is.na(linked), 0, linked)) |>
  compute()

#Pull Out the Any Linked Encounter that Is NOt the First Encounter and Assign Each Encounter an Encounter Block ID in the Original clif_hospitalization table
df_link <- clif_hospitalization_start |>
  filter(link_number>1) |>
  collect()

clif_hospitalization <- clif_hospitalization_start |>
  group_by(patient_id) |>
  arrange(patient_id, admission_dttm) |>
  #Remove Link Numbers that Are Not First in Link Encounter
  filter(link_number==1 | is.na(link_number)) |>
  #Make Encounter Blocks
  collect() |>
  mutate(encounter_block=row_number()) |>
  rowbind(df_link, fill = TRUE) |> #Bring Back in Link Numbers >1
  group_by(patient_id) |> arrange(patient_id, admission_dttm) |>
  fill(encounter_block, .direction = "down") |>
  ungroup()|>
  #Finally, for Linked Encounters Identify 'Final_admit_date' and 'final_dc_date' which are the first and last dates of a link block
  group_by(patient_id, encounter_block) |>
  mutate(final_admission_dttm=fcase(
    row_number()==1, admission_dttm
  )) |>
  mutate(final_discharge_dttm=fcase(
    row_number()==n(), discharge_dttm
  )) |>
  # mutate(final_admission_type_name=fcase(
  #   row_number()==1, admission_type_name
  # )) |>
  mutate(final_discharge_name=fcase(
    row_number()==n(), discharge_name
  )) |>
  # mutate(final_admission_type_category=fcase(
  #   row_number()==1, admission_type_category
  # )) |>
  mutate(final_discharge_category=fcase(
    row_number()==n(), discharge_category
  )) |>
  mutate(clif_hospitalizations_joined_id = cur_group_id()) |> 
  fill(starts_with("final_"), .direction = 'updown') |>
  
  dplyr::select(
    clif_hospitalizations_joined_id,
    hospitalization_id,
    patient_id,
    encounter_block,
    age_at_admission,
    admission_dttm = final_admission_dttm,
    discharge_dttm = final_discharge_dttm,
    # admission_type_name = final_admission_type_name,
    discharge_name = final_discharge_name,
    # admission_type_category = final_admission_type_category,
    discharge_category = final_discharge_category
  ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  as_arrow_table() |> 
  collect()

hosp_map <- clif_hospitalization %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  dplyr::select(
    old_hosp_id     = hospitalization_id,
    new_hosp_id     = clif_hospitalizations_joined_id,
    final_admit     = admission_dttm,
    final_discharge = discharge_dttm,
    final_discharge_name = discharge_name,
    final_discharge_category = discharge_category
  )

```

# PART ONE: Upload clif tables
```{r}
read_data <- function(file_path, select = NULL) {

  # ---- 1) Read ----
  if (grepl("\\.csv$|\\.csv\\.gz$", file_path)) {
    dt <- data.table::fread(file_path, select = select)

  } else if (grepl("\\.parquet$", file_path)) {
    if (is.null(select)) {
      dt <- arrow::read_parquet(file_path)
    } else {
      dt <- arrow::read_parquet(file_path, col_select = tidyselect::all_of(select))
    }

  } else if (grepl("\\.fst$", file_path)) {
    if (is.null(select)) {
      dt <- fst::read_fst(file_path)
    } else {
      dt <- fst::read_fst(file_path, columns = tidyselect::all_of(select))
    }

  } else {
    stop("Unsupported file format. Only CSV, Parquet, and FST are supported.")
  }

  # Convert to data.table early to avoid tibble/vctrs $<- issues
  dt <- data.table::as.data.table(dt)

  # ---- 2) Optional remap using hosp_map ----
  if (exists("hosp_map", envir = .GlobalEnv) && "hospitalization_id" %in% names(dt)) {

    # Work with a data.table copy of hosp_map, coerce join keys to character
    hm <- data.table::as.data.table(get("hosp_map", envir = .GlobalEnv))
    if (!"old_hosp_id" %in% names(hm)) stop("hosp_map missing old_hosp_id")

    hm[, old_hosp_id := as.character(old_hosp_id)]
    if ("new_hosp_id" %in% names(hm)) hm[, new_hosp_id := as.character(new_hosp_id)]

    # Coerce dt key to character
    dt[, hospitalization_id := as.character(hospitalization_id)]

    has_dates <- all(c("admission_dttm", "discharge_dttm") %in% names(dt))

    if (has_dates) {
      message("🔄 remapping hosp_id, admit & discharge")

      dt <- hm[dt, on = .(old_hosp_id = hospitalization_id)]

      dt[, hospitalization_id := data.table::fcoalesce(new_hosp_id, old_hosp_id)]

      if ("final_admit" %in% names(dt)) {
        dt[, admission_dttm := data.table::fcoalesce(final_admit, admission_dttm)]
      }

      if ("final_discharge" %in% names(dt)) {
        dt[, discharge_dttm := data.table::fcoalesce(final_discharge, discharge_dttm)]
      }

      if ("final_discharge_name" %in% names(dt)) {
        dt[, discharge_name := data.table::fcoalesce(final_discharge_name, discharge_name)]
      }

      if ("final_discharge_category" %in% names(dt)) {
        dt[, discharge_category := data.table::fcoalesce(final_discharge_category, discharge_category)]
      }

      drop_cols <- intersect(
        c("new_hosp_id", "old_hosp_id", "final_admit", "final_discharge",
          "final_discharge_name", "final_discharge_category"),
        names(dt)
      )
      if (length(drop_cols)) dt[, (drop_cols) := NULL]

    } else {
      message("🔄 remapping just hosp_id")

      dt <- hm[dt, on = .(old_hosp_id = hospitalization_id)]
      dt[, hospitalization_id := data.table::fcoalesce(new_hosp_id, old_hosp_id)]

      drop_cols <- intersect(
        c("new_hosp_id", "old_hosp_id", "final_admit", "final_discharge",
          "final_discharge_name", "final_discharge_category"),
        names(dt)
      )
      if (length(drop_cols)) dt[, (drop_cols) := NULL]
    }
  }

  # ---- 3) Normalize all *_dttm columns WITHOUT timezone conversion ----
  dttm_cols <- names(dt)[grepl("dttm$", names(dt))]

  if (length(dttm_cols)) {
    for (var in dttm_cols) {

      # If already POSIXct, leave as-is.
      # Do NOT use with_tz() here, because that can silently shift clock time.
      if (inherits(dt[[var]], "POSIXct")) {
        next
      }

      # Handle Date columns explicitly
      if (inherits(dt[[var]], "Date")) {

        # For death_dttm stored as Date, set to 23:59:00
        if (identical(var, "death_dttm")) {
          dt[, (var) := as.POSIXct(get(var)) +
               lubridate::hours(23) +
               lubridate::minutes(59)]
        } else {
          # For other *_dttm date-only fields, assign midnight
          dt[, (var) := as.POSIXct(get(var))]
        }

        next
      }

      # From here forward, assume character/factor/numeric-like input
      raw_vec <- dt[[var]]

      # Convert factors safely to character before parsing
      if (is.factor(raw_vec)) raw_vec <- as.character(raw_vec)

      # Special handling for death_dttm if date-only strings are present
      if (identical(var, "death_dttm")) {

        # Try datetime first
        suppressWarnings({
          parsed <- lubridate::ymd_hms(raw_vec, quiet = TRUE)
        })

        # For rows that failed datetime parsing, try date-only and set to 23:59
        bad_idx <- is.na(parsed) & !is.na(raw_vec) & nzchar(trimws(raw_vec))
        if (any(bad_idx)) {
          suppressWarnings({
            parsed_date <- lubridate::ymd(raw_vec[bad_idx], quiet = TRUE)
          })

          parsed[bad_idx] <- as.POSIXct(parsed_date) +
            lubridate::hours(23) +
            lubridate::minutes(59)
        }

        dt[, (var) := parsed]
        next
      }

      # General parsing for other *_dttm variables
      suppressWarnings({
        parsed <- lubridate::ymd_hms(raw_vec, quiet = TRUE)
      })

      # If datetime parsing fails for some rows, try date-only for those rows
      bad_idx <- is.na(parsed) & !is.na(raw_vec) & nzchar(trimws(raw_vec))
      if (any(bad_idx)) {
        suppressWarnings({
          parsed_date <- lubridate::ymd(raw_vec[bad_idx], quiet = TRUE)
        })
        parsed[bad_idx] <- as.POSIXct(parsed_date)
      }

      # *** REMOVED TIME ZONE CONVERSION ***
      # We do NOT call:
      #   lubridate::with_tz(...)
      # or
      #   lubridate::force_tz(...)
      # because the goal is to preserve wall-clock time exactly as recorded.
      dt[, (var) := parsed]
    }
  }

  # ---- 4) Peek & return ----
  if (nrow(dt) > 0) utils::str(head(dt))
  return(dt)
}



#Load Raw CLIF Respiratory Support, Hospitalization, Patient, ADT, Vitals, Assessments Tables
respiratory_support <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir, "clif_respiratory_support", file_type)))
respiratory_support <- unique(respiratory_support, by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm"))
respiratory_support[, device_category := tolower(device_category)]
respiratory_support[, mode_category := tolower(mode_category)]
setorder(respiratory_support, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm) 


hospitalization <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir, "clif_hospitalization", file_type)))
hospitalization <- unique(hospitalization, by = "hospitalization_id")
#Filter Out Incomplete Hospitalizations
hospitalization <- hospitalization[!is.na(admission_dttm) & !is.na(discharge_dttm) & discharge_dttm >= admission_dttm]
hospitalization[, admission_type_category := tolower(admission_type_category)]
hospitalization[, discharge_category := tolower(discharge_category)]


patient_demographics <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir,"clif_patient", file_type), select = c("patient_id", "sex_category", "race_category", "ethnicity_category", "death_dttm", "language_category")))
patient_demographics <- unique(patient_demographics, by = "patient_id")
patient_demographics[, language_category := tolower(language_category)]
patient_demographics[, sex_category := tolower(sex_category)]
patient_demographics[, race_category := tolower(race_category)]
patient_demographics[, ethnicity_category := tolower(ethnicity_category)]

#ADT
adt <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir, "clif_adt", file_type), select = c("hospitalization_id", "hospital_id", "in_dttm", "out_dttm", "location_category", "location_type")))
setorder(adt, hospitalization_id, in_dttm) 

#Vitals
vital_cats <- tolower(trimws(c("height_cm","weight_kg","sbp","dbp","map",
                             "spo2","temp_c","heart_rate","respiratory_rate")))
vitals <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir, "clif_vitals", file_type)))[vital_category %in% vital_cats]

#RASS/GCS
specific_assessment_categories <- tolower(trimws(c("rass", "gcs_total", "RASS")))
patient_assessments <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir, "clif_patient_assessments", file_type), select = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm", "assessment_category", "numerical_value", "categorical_value")))[assessment_category %in% specific_assessment_categories]
patient_assessments <- unique(patient_assessments, by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm", "assessment_category"))
patient_assessments[, assessment_category := tolower(assessment_category)]

#Elixhauser
hospital_diagnosis <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir,"clif_hospital_diagnosis", file_type), select = c("hospitalization_id", "diagnosis_code", "diagnosis_code_format")))
setorder(hospital_diagnosis, hospitalization_id)

#Labs
specific_lab_categories <- c("creatinine", "bilirubin_total", "platelet_count", "po2_arterial", "pco2_arterial", "ph_arterial", "ph_venous", "pco2_venous", "anion_gap", "troponin_t", "troponin_i", "sodium", "bicarbonate", "chloride", "bun", "albumin", "glucose_serum", "hemoglobin", "hematocrit", "lactate", "so2_arterial", "wbc")
labs_time_dependent <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir,"clif_labs", file_type), select = c("hospitalization_id", "lab_order_dttm", "lab_collect_dttm", "lab_category", "lab_value_numeric", "lab_result_dttm")))[lab_category %in% specific_lab_categories]
setorder(labs_time_dependent, hospitalization_id, lab_collect_dttm)
setnames(labs_time_dependent, "lab_collect_dttm", "recorded_dttm")

#Continuous Meds
specific_med_groups <- c("vasoactives", "sedation", "paralytics", "analgesia", "paralytic")
meds <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir,"clif_medication_admin_continuous", file_type), select = c("hospitalization_id", "admin_dttm", "med_dose", "med_dose_unit", "med_category", "med_group", "med_route_category")))[med_group %in% specific_med_groups]

#Intermittent Meds
intermittent_med_groups <- c("paralytic", "paralytics", "sedation", "analgesia")
intermittent_meds <- as.data.table(
  read_data(
    paste0(data_dir, "clif_medication_admin_intermittent", file_type),
    select = c("hospitalization_id", "admin_dttm", "med_dose", "med_dose_unit", "med_category", "med_group", "med_route_category")
  )
)[med_group %in% intermittent_med_groups]
setorder(intermittent_meds, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)

```

# PART TWO: Build Hospitalization, Location, IMV timeline for HFD, ICUFD, VFD
```{r}
# Identify All Hospitalizations with IMV
resp_supp_imv_id <- respiratory_support[device_category == "imv"]
imv_hospitalizations <- hospitalization[hospitalization_id %in% resp_supp_imv_id$hospitalization_id]

# Pull All Hospitalizations for Patients with IMV at patient_id level
imv_pat_id <- unique(imv_hospitalizations$patient_id)
imv_hospitalizations_full_hx <- hospitalization[patient_id %in% imv_pat_id]

resp_supp_full_hx <- respiratory_support[hospitalization_id %in% imv_hospitalizations_full_hx$hospitalization_id]

# Create Table of Hospital Days, using calendar day as the index
hospital_days <- imv_hospitalizations_full_hx[, {

  admit_date <- as.Date(admission_dttm)
  discharge_date <- as.Date(discharge_dttm)

  all_dates <- seq(admit_date, discharge_date, by = "day")
  n_days <- length(all_dates)

  # *** preserve the timezone attribute already present ***
  tz_use <- attr(admission_dttm, "tzone")
  if (is.null(tz_use) || length(tz_use) == 0 || tz_use == "") tz_use <- ""

  # *** do not force UTC ***
  calendar_starts <- as.POSIXct(all_dates, tz = tz_use)
  next_day_starts <- as.POSIXct(all_dates + 1, tz = tz_use)

  day_start_time <- calendar_starts
  day_end_time <- next_day_starts

  day_start_time[1] <- admission_dttm
  day_end_time[n_days] <- discharge_dttm

  data.table::data.table(
    hospitalization_id = hospitalization_id,
    patient_id = patient_id,
    hospital_day_id = seq_len(n_days),
    calendar_date = all_dates,
    day_start_time = day_start_time,
    day_end_time = day_end_time
  )
}, by = hospitalization_id]


# Identify ICU days using ADT table - any hospital day where at least part of it is spent in the ICU counts as an ICU day
adt_icu <- adt[location_category == "icu"]

icu_overlap <- adt_icu[
  hospital_days,
  on = .(
    hospitalization_id,
    in_dttm < day_end_time,
    out_dttm > day_start_time
  ),
  nomatch = 0,
  allow.cartesian = TRUE
]

icu_days_flag <- icu_overlap[
  , .(icu_day = TRUE),
  by = .(hospitalization_id, hospital_day_id)
]

hospital_days <- icu_days_flag[
  hospital_days,
  on = .(hospitalization_id, hospital_day_id)
]

hospital_days[is.na(icu_day), icu_day := FALSE]

# Identify Ventilator Days - any day where patient has a device_category = imv and at least 2 vent settings counts as a day not liberated from the vent
# Define the IMV settings columns
imv_setting_cols <- c(
  "mode_category",
  "fio2_set",
  "tidal_volume_set",
  "resp_rate_set",
  "peep_set",
  "pressure_control_set",
  "pressure_support_set"
)

# Count how many IMV setting columns are non-missing for each row
resp_supp_full_hx[, n_imv_settings_present :=
  rowSums(!is.na(.SD)),
  .SDcols = imv_setting_cols
]

# Keep rows that meet ventilator rule
resp_imv_valid <- resp_supp_full_hx[
  device_category == "imv" & n_imv_settings_present >= 2
]

# Join qualifying respiratory support rows to hospital days
vent_day_matches <- hospital_days[
  resp_imv_valid,
  on = .(
    hospitalization_id,
    day_start_time <= recorded_dttm,
    day_end_time > recorded_dttm
  ),
  nomatch = 0,
  allow.cartesian = TRUE
]

# Collapse to day-level flag
vent_day_flag <- vent_day_matches[
  , .(vent_day = TRUE),
  by = .(hospitalization_id, hospital_day_id)
]

# Merge back to hospital_days
hospital_days <- vent_day_flag[
  hospital_days,
  on = .(hospitalization_id, hospital_day_id)
]

hospital_days[is.na(vent_day), vent_day := FALSE]
setorder(hospital_days, patient_id, calendar_date)

```


#PART THREE: Create Full Cleaned Cohort
```{r}
# Total Respiratory Support Table for IMV Hospitalizations
respiratory_support_imv <- respiratory_support[hospitalization_id %in% resp_supp_imv_id$hospitalization_id]
setorder(respiratory_support_imv, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# Convert blank values in device_category to "NA"
respiratory_support_imv[device_category == "", device_category := NA]

# Determine First Device
first_device_table <- respiratory_support_imv[
  !is.na(device_category),
  .(first_device = device_category[1]),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# Count how many vent-related fields are populated on each row
respiratory_support_imv[, imv_setting_count := rowSums(!is.na(.SD)), .SDcols = imv_setting_cols]

# Define imv_signal as "imv" in device_category and at least 2 imv settings
respiratory_support_imv[, imv_signal :=
  !is.na(device_category) &
  tolower(device_category) == "imv" &
  imv_setting_count >= 2
]

# Define non-imv rows
respiratory_support_imv[, explicit_non_imv :=
  !is.na(device_category) &
  tolower(device_category) != "imv"
]

# Identify IMV Runs
imv_runs <- respiratory_support_imv[, {
  
  n <- .N
  run_list <- list()
  
  in_run <- FALSE
  run_id_counter <- 0
  run_start <- as.POSIXct(NA)
  last_imv_time <- as.POSIXct(NA)
  imv_row_count <- 0L
  
  i <- 1
  
  while (i <= n) {
    
    # Start a new IMV run when first positive IMV signal appears
    if (!in_run && isTRUE(imv_signal[i])) {
      in_run <- TRUE
      run_id_counter <- run_id_counter + 1
      run_start <- recorded_dttm[i]
      last_imv_time <- recorded_dttm[i]
      imv_row_count <- 1L
      i <- i + 1
      next
    }
    
    if (in_run) {
      
      # Update last known IMV timestamp and count if current row has positive IMV evidence
      if (isTRUE(imv_signal[i])) {
        last_imv_time <- recorded_dttm[i]
        imv_row_count <- imv_row_count + 1L
      }
      
      # Stop rule 1:
      # Two consecutive explicit non-IMV device rows
      two_non_imv <- FALSE
      if (i < n) {
        two_non_imv <- isTRUE(explicit_non_imv[i]) && isTRUE(explicit_non_imv[i + 1])
      }
      
      # Stop rule 2:
      # A long gap since last positive IMV evidence
      long_gap <- FALSE
      if (!is.na(last_imv_time)) {
        long_gap <- as.numeric(difftime(recorded_dttm[i], last_imv_time, units = "hours")) >= 24
      }
      
      # If either stop condition is met, close current run
      if (two_non_imv || long_gap) {
        run_list[[length(run_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
          run_id = run_id_counter,
          begin_imv = run_start,
          end_imv = last_imv_time,
          n_imv_rows = imv_row_count
        )
        
        in_run <- FALSE
        run_start <- as.POSIXct(NA)
        last_imv_time <- as.POSIXct(NA)
        imv_row_count <- 0L
        
        # Do not skip ahead; continue scanning so later rows can start a new run
      }
    }
    
    i <- i + 1
  }
  
  # If still in an IMV run at end of hospitalization, close it
  if (in_run) {
    run_list[[length(run_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
      run_id = run_id_counter,
      begin_imv = run_start,
      end_imv = last_imv_time,
      n_imv_rows = imv_row_count
    )
  }
  
  if (length(run_list) > 0) {
    rbindlist(run_list)
  } else {
    NULL
  }
  
}, by = hospitalization_id]

# Calculate time from current end_imv to next begin_imv
imv_runs[, next_begin_imv := shift(begin_imv, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]

imv_runs[, time_to_next_imv_hours :=
  as.numeric(difftime(next_begin_imv, end_imv, units = "hours"))
]
imv_runs[, next_begin_imv := NULL]

# Add duration of IMV in hours
imv_runs[, `:=`(
  imv_duration_hours = as.numeric(difftime(end_imv, begin_imv, units = "hours"))
), by = hospitalization_id]
imv_runs <- imv_runs[, .(hospitalization_id, begin_imv, end_imv, time_to_next_imv_hours, imv_duration_hours, run_id, n_imv_rows)]

# Filter out non-real runs
imv_runs <- imv_runs[!is.na(imv_duration_hours) & imv_duration_hours > 0]
imv_runs <- imv_runs[n_imv_rows > 2]

# Create reintubation flag: 1 if >1 run_id in a hospitalization, else 0
imv_runs[, reintubation :=
  as.integer(.N > 1),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# Determine Tracheostomy Data
###############################################################################
# Identify hospitalization_ids that have tracheostomy at some point during 
# their hospitalization and earliest timestamp within that hospitalization
trach_resp <- respiratory_support[tracheostomy == "1"]
trach_dttm_table <- trach_resp[, .(trach_dttm = min(recorded_dttm, na.rm = TRUE)), by = hospitalization_id]

# Identify hospitalization_ids that have "trach collar" device at any point in hospitalization
# and corresponding earliest timestamp within that hospitalization
trach_collar_resp <- respiratory_support[device_category == "trach collar"]
trach_collar_dttm_table <- trach_collar_resp[, .(trach_collar_dttm = min(recorded_dttm, na.rm = TRUE)), by = hospitalization_id]

# Merge the two trach hospitalization timestamp tables
trach_times <- merge(trach_dttm_table, trach_collar_dttm_table, by = "hospitalization_id",
  all = TRUE)

# Earliest trach-related timestamp within each hospitalization
trach_times[, first_trach_dttm := pmin(trach_dttm, trach_collar_dttm, na.rm = TRUE)]
trach_times[is.infinite(first_trach_dttm), first_trach_dttm := as.POSIXct(NA)]

# Hospitalization table for patients who ever had a trach-related event
hosp_id_trach_total <- unique(trach_times$hospitalization_id)
hospitalization_trach <- hospitalization[hospitalization_id %in% hosp_id_trach_total]

# Pull all hospitalizations for each patient_id associated with a trach hospitalization
all_hospitalizations_trach_patients <- hospitalization[
  patient_id %in% hospitalization_trach$patient_id
]

# Merge hospitalization-level trach times onto all hospitalizations for these patients
all_hosp_w_trach_times <- merge(
  all_hospitalizations_trach_patients,
  trach_times[, .(hospitalization_id, first_trach_dttm)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Preserve trach that occurred during this same hospitalization
all_hosp_w_trach_times[, trach_this_admission_dttm := first_trach_dttm]

# Unique row ID for each admission
all_hosp_w_trach_times[, adm_row_id := .I]

# Build lookup of all hospitalization-level trach events by patient
trach_lookup <- merge(
  trach_times[, .(hospitalization_id, first_trach_dttm)],
  hospitalization[, .(hospitalization_id, patient_id)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

trach_lookup <- trach_lookup[!is.na(first_trach_dttm)]

# Rename lookup hospitalization_id so it is clear this is the source hospitalization
setnames(trach_lookup, "hospitalization_id", "source_hospitalization_id")

# Build admission-side lookup table
adm_lookup <- all_hosp_w_trach_times[, .(
  adm_row_id,
  patient_id,
  cohort_hospitalization_id = hospitalization_id,
  admission_dttm
)]

# Merge all trach events to all admissions for the same patient
prior_trach_candidates <- merge(
  adm_lookup,
  trach_lookup,
  by = "patient_id",
  allow.cartesian = TRUE
)

# Keep only trach events that are:
# 1) strictly before admission
# 2) from a different hospitalization
prior_trach_candidates <- prior_trach_candidates[
  first_trach_dttm < admission_dttm &
  source_hospitalization_id != cohort_hospitalization_id
]

# For each admission, keep the most recent prior trach
setorder(prior_trach_candidates, adm_row_id, first_trach_dttm)

most_recent_prior_trach <- prior_trach_candidates[
  , .SD[.N],
  by = adm_row_id
][
  , .(
    adm_row_id,
    most_recent_trach_before_admission = first_trach_dttm
  )
]

# Merge back
all_hosp_w_trach_times <- merge(
  all_hosp_w_trach_times,
  most_recent_prior_trach,
  by = "adm_row_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Drop helper column if desired
all_hosp_w_trach_times[, adm_row_id := NULL]

# Since we now have trach timing information for all hospitalizations for patients with any trach history,
# filter only for those with known IMV run times
imv_pts_w_trach <- all_hosp_w_trach_times[
  hospitalization_id %in% imv_runs$hospitalization_id
]
setorder(imv_pts_w_trach, patient_id, admission_dttm)

# Merge trach IMV patients with IMV run details
imv_runs_final_simple <- imv_runs[, .(
  hospitalization_id,
  run_id,
  begin_imv,
  end_imv,
  imv_duration_hours,
  reintubation
)]

full_trach_table <- merge(
  imv_pts_w_trach,
  imv_runs_final_simple,
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all = TRUE
)

full_trach_table_filt <- full_trach_table[
  hospitalization_id %in% imv_pts_w_trach$hospitalization_id
]

full_trach_table_filt <- full_trach_table_filt[, .(
  hospitalization_id,
  patient_id,
  admission_dttm,
  discharge_dttm,
  discharge_category,
  begin_imv,
  end_imv,
  trach_this_admission_dttm,
  most_recent_trach_before_admission
)]

# Create a single admission-specific trach variable for downstream in-hospital timing logic
full_trach_table_filt[, first_trach_dttm := trach_this_admission_dttm]

# Flag for being trached during this admission
full_trach_table_filt[, trached_during_admission :=
  !is.na(trach_this_admission_dttm) &
  trach_this_admission_dttm >= admission_dttm &
  trach_this_admission_dttm <= discharge_dttm
]

# Prior trach within 6 months before admission
full_trach_table_filt[, trached_within_6months_before_admission :=
  !is.na(most_recent_trach_before_admission) &
  most_recent_trach_before_admission < admission_dttm &
  most_recent_trach_before_admission >= (admission_dttm - lubridate::days(183))
]

# Trach documented during this admission and within 72h before/after IMV
full_trach_table_filt[, trached_within_72_hours_of_imv :=
  !is.na(trach_this_admission_dttm) &
  !is.na(begin_imv) &
  trach_this_admission_dttm >= (begin_imv - lubridate::hours(72)) &
  trach_this_admission_dttm <= (begin_imv + lubridate::hours(72))
]

# Flag for missed trach patients
full_trach_table_filt[, ventilated_at_discharge := ifelse(
  difftime(discharge_dttm, end_imv, units = "hours") <= 2 | end_imv > discharge_dttm,
  TRUE, FALSE
)]

full_trach_table_filt[, missed_trach :=
  ifelse(
    ventilated_at_discharge == TRUE &
      !(discharge_category %in% c("Expired", "Other", "Acute Care Hospital", "Hospice")),
    TRUE, FALSE
  )
]

# Put together trach IMV runs combining trach information and reintubation information
trach_imv_runs <- merge(
  full_trach_table_filt,
  imv_runs_final_simple,
  by = c("hospitalization_id", "begin_imv", "end_imv"),
  all = TRUE
)

# Need to calculate imv_duration_hours_trach variable for non-reintubated patients
trach_imv_runs[, imv_duration_hours_trach :=
  ifelse(
    reintubation == 0 & !is.na(trach_this_admission_dttm),
    as.numeric(difftime(trach_this_admission_dttm, begin_imv, units = "hours")),
    NA_real_
  )
]

# Flag for trached prior to IMV
trach_imv_runs[, trached_before_imv := as.integer(
  (!is.na(trach_this_admission_dttm) & !is.na(begin_imv) & trach_this_admission_dttm <= begin_imv) |
  (!is.na(most_recent_trach_before_admission) & !is.na(begin_imv) & most_recent_trach_before_admission <= begin_imv) |
  missed_trach == TRUE
)]
trach_imv_runs[is.na(trached_before_imv), trached_before_imv := 0L]

# Trached flag: only count trach occurring after admission during this hospitalization
trach_imv_runs[, trached := fifelse(
  !is.na(trach_this_admission_dttm) & trach_this_admission_dttm > admission_dttm,
  1, 0
)]

# Final trach IMV run table
trach_imv_runs <- trach_imv_runs[, .(
  hospitalization_id,
  run_id,
  first_trach_dttm = trach_this_admission_dttm,
  most_recent_trach_before_admission,
  imv_duration_hours_trach,
  trached_before_imv,
  trached
)]

trach_imv_runs <- unique(trach_imv_runs, by = c("hospitalization_id", "run_id"))

# Merge back to imv_runs_final
imv_runs <- merge(
  imv_runs,
  trach_imv_runs,
  by = c("hospitalization_id", "run_id"),
  all = TRUE
)
setorder(imv_runs, hospitalization_id, run_id)
###############################################################################

# Identify real reintubations vs trach patients going on and off of settings
# Count number of runs per hospitalization
imv_runs[, n_runs := .N, by = hospitalization_id]

# Pull first run begin_imv onto every row within hospitalization
imv_runs[, first_run_begin_imv := begin_imv[1], by = hospitalization_id]

# Rule 1:
# Pre-admission trach within 6 calendar months before first IMV run
imv_runs[, preadmission_trach_recent :=
  !is.na(most_recent_trach_before_admission) &
  !is.na(first_run_begin_imv) &
  most_recent_trach_before_admission <= first_run_begin_imv &
  most_recent_trach_before_admission >= (first_run_begin_imv %m-% months(6))
]

# Rule 2:
# A trach had already occurred before this run began
# This will flag all runs AFTER the run during which trach occurred
imv_runs[, trach_before_this_run :=
  !is.na(first_trach_dttm) &
  !is.na(begin_imv) &
  first_trach_dttm < begin_imv
]

# Create reintubation_real
imv_runs[, reintubation_real := fifelse(
  n_runs == 1, 0L,                               # only one run in hospitalization
  fifelse(
    run_id == 1, 0L,                             # first run is never a reintubation
    fifelse(
      preadmission_trach_recent | trach_before_this_run,
      0L,                                        # not a true reintubation
      1L                                         # true reintubation
    )
  )
)]

imv_runs[, c("n_runs", "first_run_begin_imv", "trach_before_this_run") := NULL]
setorder(imv_runs, hospitalization_id, run_id)
##############################################################################
# Determine if Trached at Admission
# Pull first run begin_imv onto every row within hospitalization
imv_runs[, first_run_begin_imv := begin_imv[1], by = hospitalization_id]

# Create trached_at_admission
imv_runs[, trached_at_admission :=
  preadmission_trach_recent |
  (
    !is.na(first_trach_dttm) &
    !is.na(first_run_begin_imv) &
    first_trach_dttm >= first_run_begin_imv &
    first_trach_dttm <= first_run_begin_imv + lubridate::hours(24)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

imv_runs[, first_run_begin_imv := NULL]
setorder(imv_runs, hospitalization_id, run_id)
###############################################################################
# Remove false reintubations (trached patients going on and off settings) &
# Remove additional imv_runs for patients trached at admission (not real)

# Identify hospitalizations where a later run looks like a false reintubation
imv_runs[, false_reintubation_hosp :=
  any(run_id > 1 & reintubation == 1 & reintubation_real == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# Create temporary cleaned version for counting IMV episodes
imv_runs_clean <- imv_runs[
  !(
    (trached_at_admission == TRUE | false_reintubation_hosp == TRUE) &
    run_id > 1
  )
]

##############################################################################
# Create reintubation_final at hospitalization level and propagate to all rows
imv_runs_clean[, reintubation_final :=
  as.integer(any(reintubation_real == 1, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# Calculate IMV duration (hours), truncating at trach if it occurs during the run
imv_runs_clean[, imv_duration_hours_final :=
  as.numeric(difftime(
    fifelse(
      !is.na(first_trach_dttm) &
      first_trach_dttm >= begin_imv &
      first_trach_dttm <= end_imv,
      first_trach_dttm,
      end_imv
    ),
    begin_imv,
    units = "hours"
  ))
]

#Narrow down columns
imv_runs_clean <- imv_runs_clean[, .(hospitalization_id, run_id, begin_imv,
  end_imv, imv_duration_hours_final, trached, reintubation_final,
  trached_at_admission)]

##############################################################################
#Use ADT to determine first location, procedural intubations
adt_imv <- adt[hospitalization_id %in% imv_runs_clean$hospitalization_id]
setorder(adt_imv, hospitalization_id, in_dttm)

#First Location
first_location_table <- adt_imv[
  ,
  {
    # overall first location
    idx_all <- which(!is.na(location_category))[1]
    
    # first ICU location
    idx_icu <- which(location_category == "icu")[1]
    
    .(
      first_location_category = if (is.na(idx_all)) NA_character_ else location_category[idx_all],
      first_location_dttm     = if (is.na(idx_all)) as.POSIXct(NA) else in_dttm[idx_all]
    )
  },
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# Find the location_of_intubation
# 1) Direct match: begin_imv occurs inside ADT row
location_in_window <- adt_imv[
  imv_runs_clean,
  on = .(
    hospitalization_id,
    in_dttm <= begin_imv,
    out_dttm > begin_imv
  ),
  mult = "first",
  nomatch = 0L,
  .(
    hospitalization_id = i.hospitalization_id,
    run_id = i.run_id,
    begin_imv = i.begin_imv,
    location_of_intubation = location_category,
    location_source = "matched_adt_interval"
  )
]

# 2) First ADT row per hospitalization
first_adt <- adt_imv[
  order(hospitalization_id, in_dttm, out_dttm)
][
  , .SD[1], by = hospitalization_id
][
  , .(
    hospitalization_id,
    first_in_dttm = in_dttm,
    first_location_category = location_category
  )
]

# 3) Runs not matched in-window
runs_missing_loc <- imv_runs_clean[
  !location_in_window,
  on = .(hospitalization_id, run_id)
]

# 4) Fallback for begin_imv before first ADT row
location_before_first <- first_adt[
  runs_missing_loc,
  on = .(hospitalization_id)
][
  , diff_mins := as.numeric(difftime(first_in_dttm, begin_imv, units = "mins"))
][
  !is.na(first_in_dttm) & begin_imv < first_in_dttm,
  .(
    hospitalization_id,
    run_id,
    begin_imv,
    location_of_intubation = fifelse(
      diff_mins <= 30,
      first_location_category,
      "pre_hospital"
    ),
    location_source = fifelse(
      diff_mins <= 30,
      "defaulted_to_first_adt_within_30min",
      "pre_hospital_gt_30min_before_first_adt"
    )
  )
]

# 5) Remaining unmatched after "before first" rule
matched_so_far <- rbindlist(
  list(location_in_window, location_before_first),
  use.names = TRUE,
  fill = TRUE
)[, .(hospitalization_id, run_id)]

runs_still_missing <- imv_runs_clean[
  !matched_so_far,
  on = .(hospitalization_id, run_id)
]

# 6) Previous ADT row before begin_imv
prev_loc <- adt_imv[
  runs_still_missing,
  on = .(
    hospitalization_id,
    out_dttm <= begin_imv
  ),
  mult = "last",
  .(
    hospitalization_id = i.hospitalization_id,
    run_id = i.run_id,
    begin_imv = i.begin_imv,
    prev_location_category = location_category,
    prev_out_dttm = out_dttm
  )
]

# 7) Next ADT row after begin_imv
next_loc <- adt_imv[
  runs_still_missing,
  on = .(
    hospitalization_id,
    in_dttm >= begin_imv
  ),
  mult = "first",
  .(
    hospitalization_id = i.hospitalization_id,
    run_id = i.run_id,
    begin_imv = i.begin_imv,
    next_location_category = location_category,
    next_in_dttm = in_dttm
  )
]

# 8) Combine prev and next, decide closest row
gap_fallback <- merge(
  prev_loc,
  next_loc,
  by = c("hospitalization_id", "run_id", "begin_imv"),
  all = TRUE
)[
  , `:=`(
    prev_gap_mins = as.numeric(difftime(begin_imv, prev_out_dttm, units = "mins")),
    next_gap_mins = as.numeric(difftime(next_in_dttm, begin_imv, units = "mins"))
  )
][
  ,
  location_of_intubation := fifelse(
    !is.na(prev_gap_mins) & !is.na(next_gap_mins) & prev_gap_mins <= next_gap_mins,
    prev_location_category,
    fifelse(
      !is.na(prev_gap_mins) & !is.na(next_gap_mins) & next_gap_mins < prev_gap_mins,
      next_location_category,
      fifelse(
        !is.na(prev_gap_mins) & is.na(next_gap_mins),
        prev_location_category,
        fifelse(
          is.na(prev_gap_mins) & !is.na(next_gap_mins),
          next_location_category,
          NA_character_
        )
      )
    )
  )
][
  ,
  location_source := fifelse(
    !is.na(prev_gap_mins) & !is.na(next_gap_mins) & prev_gap_mins <= next_gap_mins,
    "gap_defaulted_to_previous_adt",
    fifelse(
      !is.na(prev_gap_mins) & !is.na(next_gap_mins) & next_gap_mins < prev_gap_mins,
      "gap_defaulted_to_next_adt",
      fifelse(
        !is.na(prev_gap_mins) & is.na(next_gap_mins),
        "defaulted_to_previous_adt_only",
        fifelse(
          is.na(prev_gap_mins) & !is.na(next_gap_mins),
          "defaulted_to_next_adt_only",
          NA_character_
        )
      )
    )
  )
][
  !is.na(location_of_intubation),
  .(
    hospitalization_id,
    run_id,
    begin_imv,
    location_of_intubation,
    location_source
  )
]

# 9) Final combine
location_of_intubation_final <- rbindlist(
  list(
    location_in_window,
    location_before_first,
    gap_fallback
  ),
  use.names = TRUE,
  fill = TRUE
)

location_of_intubation_final <- unique(
  location_of_intubation_final,
  by = c("hospitalization_id", "run_id")
)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Find all ADT rows overlapping each IMV run
imv_int <- copy(imv_runs_clean)[
  , `:=`(imv_start = begin_imv, imv_end = end_imv)
]

adt_int <- copy(adt_imv)[
  , `:=`(adt_start = in_dttm, adt_end = out_dttm)
]

setkey(adt_int, hospitalization_id, adt_start, adt_end)

overlaps <- foverlaps(
  x = imv_int,
  y = adt_int,
  by.x = c("hospitalization_id", "imv_start", "imv_end"),
  by.y = c("hospitalization_id", "adt_start", "adt_end"),
  type = "any",
  nomatch = 0L
)


# Identify Admissions for Procedures Only
procedures_only_runs <- overlaps[
  , .(
    n_adt_rows = .N,
    all_procedural = all(location_category == "procedural", na.rm = FALSE)
  ),
  by = .(hospitalization_id, run_id)
][
  n_adt_rows == 1 & all_procedural == TRUE
][
  , .(hospitalization_id, run_id, procedures_only = TRUE)
]

# Remove Procedures Only Admissions
procedures_to_remove <- procedures_only_runs[
  procedures_only == TRUE,
  .(hospitalization_id, run_id)
]

imv_runs_clean_final <- imv_runs_clean[
  !procedures_to_remove,
  on = .(hospitalization_id, run_id)
]

location_of_intubation_final_clean <- location_of_intubation_final[
  !procedures_to_remove,
  on = .(hospitalization_id, run_id)
]


#For each run_id, take the first non-NA location_type during the IMV run
# ---------------------------------------------------------
first_icu <- adt_imv[
  imv_runs_clean_final,
  on = .(
    hospitalization_id,
    in_dttm < end_imv,
    out_dttm > begin_imv
  ),
  allow.cartesian = TRUE,
  nomatch = 0L,
  .(
    hospitalization_id = x.hospitalization_id,
    hospital_id = x.hospital_id,
    run_id = i.run_id,
    begin_imv = i.begin_imv,
    end_imv = i.end_imv,
    in_dttm = x.in_dttm,
    out_dttm = x.out_dttm,
    location_category = x.location_category,
    location_type = x.location_type
  )
][
  location_category == "icu" &
    !is.na(location_type) &
    trimws(location_type) != ""
][
  order(hospitalization_id, run_id, in_dttm, out_dttm)
][
  , .SD[1], by = .(hospitalization_id, run_id)
][
  , .(
    hospitalization_id,
    hospital_id,
    run_id,
    icu_imv = location_type,
    icu_admission_dttm = in_dttm
  )
]


# Merge results back to imv_runs
# ---------------------------------------------------------
imv_runs_final <- merge(
  imv_runs_clean_final,
  location_of_intubation_final_clean,
  by = c("hospitalization_id", "run_id", "begin_imv"),
  all.x = TRUE
)

imv_runs_final <- merge(
  imv_runs_final,
  first_icu,
  by = c("hospitalization_id", "run_id"),
  all.x = TRUE
)

setorder(imv_runs_final, hospitalization_id, run_id)
imv_runs_final[
  order(hospitalization_id, begin_imv),
  run_id := frank(begin_imv, ties.method = "dense"),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

#Append admission_dttm, first_device, first_location to imv_runs_final
imv_runs_final <- imv_hospitalizations[
  imv_runs_final,
  on = .(hospitalization_id)
][
  ,
  .(hospitalization_id, hospital_id, run_id, admission_dttm,
    admission_type_category, discharge_dttm, begin_imv, end_imv, 
    imv_duration_hours_final, trached, reintubation_final, trached_at_admission,
    location_of_intubation, location_source, icu_imv, icu_admission_dttm)]

imv_runs_final <- first_device_table[
  imv_runs_final,
  on = .(hospitalization_id)
][
  ,
  .(hospitalization_id, hospital_id, run_id, admission_dttm,
    admission_type_category, discharge_dttm, begin_imv, end_imv, 
    imv_duration_hours_final, trached, reintubation_final, trached_at_admission,
    location_of_intubation, location_source, icu_imv, icu_admission_dttm, 
    first_device)]

imv_runs_final <- first_location_table[
  imv_runs_final,
  on = .(hospitalization_id)
][
  ,
  .(hospitalization_id, hospital_id, run_id, admission_dttm,
    admission_type_category, discharge_dttm, begin_imv, end_imv, 
    imv_duration_hours_final, trached, reintubation_final, trached_at_admission,
    location_of_intubation, location_source, icu_imv, icu_admission_dttm, 
    first_device, first_location_category, first_location_dttm)]


# calculate time from admission to begin_imv
imv_runs_final[, time_from_admission_to_begin_imv_hours :=
  as.numeric(difftime(begin_imv, admission_dttm, units = "hours"))
]


# calculate time from presentation to begin_imv
imv_runs_final[, time_from_presentation_to_begin_imv_hours :=
  as.numeric(difftime(begin_imv, first_location_dttm, units = "hours"))
]


# calculate time from imv to ICU admission
imv_runs_final[, time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours :=
  as.numeric(difftime(icu_admission_dttm, begin_imv, units = "hours"))
]


#define osh intubations
imv_runs_final[
  , osh_intubation := admission_type_category == "osh" &
                       first_device == "imv" &
                       time_from_admission_to_begin_imv_hours <= 4
]

###############################################################################
# Create Hospitalization Table for Filtered Hospitalizations 
hospitalization_table_part_four <- hospitalization[hospitalization_id %in% imv_runs_final$hospitalization_id]
setnames(hospitalization_table_part_four, "admission_dttm", "cohort_admission_dttm")
setnames(hospitalization_table_part_four, "discharge_dttm", "cohort_discharge_dttm")
setnames(hospitalization_table_part_four, "hospitalization_id", "cohort_hospitalization_id")
hospitalization_table_part_four[, cohort_admission_dttm := as.POSIXct(cohort_admission_dttm, tz = time_zone)]

#Create time_markers
hospitalization_table_part_four[, `12_months_after` := add_with_rollback(cohort_admission_dttm, months(12))]
hospitalization_table_part_four[, `12_months_before` := add_with_rollback(cohort_admission_dttm, months(-12))]

# Create Table of All Hospitalizations for Patients Filtered Above
hosp_height_weight_all <- hospitalization[patient_id %in% hospitalization_table_part_four$patient_id]
hosp_height_weight_all <- hosp_height_weight_all[, .(hospitalization_id, patient_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm)]
setorder(hosp_height_weight_all, patient_id, admission_dttm)

#Merge Cohort and Height Weight Hospitalizations
hosp_height_weight_filt <- merge(hosp_height_weight_all, hospitalization_table_part_four, by = "patient_id", allow.cartesian = TRUE)
hosp_height_weight_filt <- hosp_height_weight_filt %>%
  filter(admission_dttm >= `12_months_before` & admission_dttm <= `12_months_after`)
setDT(hosp_height_weight_filt)

set(hosp_height_weight_filt, j = "patient_cohort_id", 
    value = paste(hosp_height_weight_filt$patient_id, 
                  hosp_height_weight_filt$cohort_hospitalization_id, sep = "_"))

# Create Vitals Table 
height_weight <- c("height_cm", "weight_kg")
vitals_bmi <- vitals[hospitalization_id %in% hosp_height_weight_filt$hospitalization_id & vital_category %in% height_weight]

# Reshape the data to put height/weight into separate columns, using mean to handle duplicates
vitals_bmi_wide <- dcast(vitals_bmi, 
                   hospitalization_id + recorded_dttm ~ vital_category, 
                   value.var = "vital_value", 
                   fun.aggregate = mean,  # Aggregate duplicates using mean
                   fill = NA)  # Fill missing values with NA
vitals_bmi_wide <- vitals_bmi_wide[, .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, weight_kg, height_cm)]
setorder(vitals_bmi_wide, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# Obtain Patient_IDs associated with BMI Hospitalizations and merge with reshaped table
pat_hosp_list <- hosp_height_weight_filt[, .(patient_id, hospitalization_id, patient_cohort_id, cohort_admission_dttm, cohort_hospitalization_id)]
vitals_bmi_patient <- merge(vitals_bmi_wide, pat_hosp_list, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE, allow.cartesian = TRUE)
setorder(vitals_bmi_patient, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# Table of All Height Values - filter out very low values
height_patient <- vitals_bmi_patient[!is.na(height_cm)]
height_patient <- height_patient[, .(patient_cohort_id, hospitalization_id, cohort_hospitalization_id, cohort_admission_dttm, recorded_dttm, height_cm)]
height_patient <- height_patient[height_cm >= 100]

# Find Median Height for each Patient within +/- 1 year of IMV hospitalization
median_height_per_patient <- height_patient[, .(
  median_height = median(height_cm, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = patient_cohort_id]

height_hosp <- merge(median_height_per_patient, hosp_height_weight_filt, by = "patient_cohort_id", all.x = TRUE)
height_hosp <- height_hosp[, .(hospitalization_id, patient_cohort_id, cohort_hospitalization_id, median_height)]
height_hosp_filtered <- height_hosp[
  hospitalization_id == cohort_hospitalization_id
]

# ----------------------------
# Clean weights using patient-level anchor across +/- 12 months
# ----------------------------
weight_patient <- vitals_bmi_patient[!is.na(weight_kg)]
weight_patient <- weight_patient[, .(
  patient_cohort_id,
  hospitalization_id,
  cohort_hospitalization_id,
  cohort_admission_dttm,
  recorded_dttm,
  weight_kg
)]

# Raw interpretations
weight_patient[, kg_as_entered := weight_kg]
weight_patient[, kg_if_lbs := weight_kg / 2.20462]

# Keep values plausible in at least one interpretation
weight_patient <- weight_patient[
  between(kg_as_entered, 30, 400) | between(kg_if_lbs, 30, 400)
]

# Patient-level anchor:
# prefer weights already plausible as kg, otherwise fallback to converted lbs
weight_anchor <- weight_patient[
  between(kg_as_entered, 35, 250),
  .(anchor_kg = median(kg_as_entered, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = patient_cohort_id
]

weight_anchor_fallback <- weight_patient[
  ,
  .(anchor_kg_fallback = median(kg_if_lbs, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = patient_cohort_id
]

weight_anchor <- merge(
  weight_anchor_fallback,
  weight_anchor,
  by = "patient_cohort_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

weight_anchor[, anchor_kg := fifelse(
  is.na(anchor_kg),
  anchor_kg_fallback,
  anchor_kg
)]
weight_anchor[, anchor_kg_fallback := NULL]

# Apply anchor to choose correct interpretation
weight_patient_clean <- merge(
  weight_patient,
  weight_anchor,
  by = "patient_cohort_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

weight_patient_clean[, diff_as_entered := abs(kg_as_entered - anchor_kg)]
weight_patient_clean[, diff_if_lbs := abs(kg_if_lbs - anchor_kg)]

weight_patient_clean[, weight_kg_clean := fifelse(
  is.na(anchor_kg), NA_real_,
  fifelse(diff_if_lbs < diff_as_entered, kg_if_lbs, kg_as_entered)
)]

weight_patient_clean[, interpreted_as_lbs := diff_if_lbs < diff_as_entered]

# Final plausibility filter
weight_patient_clean <- weight_patient_clean[
  between(weight_kg_clean, 35, 300)
]

# Choose cleaned weight closest to admission for the cohort hospitalization
weight_patient_clean[, time_diff := abs(as.numeric(difftime(
  cohort_admission_dttm,
  recorded_dttm,
  units = "secs"
)))]

admission_weight_table <- weight_patient_clean[
  ,
  .SD[which.min(time_diff)],
  by = .(patient_cohort_id, cohort_admission_dttm),
  .SDcols = c(
    "patient_cohort_id",
    "cohort_admission_dttm",
    "weight_kg_clean",
    "hospitalization_id",
    "recorded_dttm",
    "interpreted_as_lbs",
    "anchor_kg"
  )
]

final_weight_table <- admission_weight_table[, .(
  patient_cohort_id,
  weight_kg = weight_kg_clean
)]

# Create BMI Table, heigh_m column, and calculate BMI
patient_bmi_data <- merge(final_weight_table, height_hosp_filtered, by = c("patient_cohort_id"), 
  all = TRUE)
patient_bmi_data[, height_m := median_height / 100]
patient_bmi_data[, bmi := weight_kg / (height_m^2)]

# Cleaned BMI Table
patient_bmi_data_clean <- patient_bmi_data[, .(hospitalization_id, weight_kg, median_height, bmi)]
setnames(patient_bmi_data_clean, "median_height", "admission_height")

# BMI/Height/Weight Data for Hospitalizations Through Part Six
patient_bmi_data_final <- patient_bmi_data_clean[hospitalization_id %in% imv_runs_final$hospitalization_id]

# Filter out patients with no BMI data - removes ~111
patient_bmi_data_final <- patient_bmi_data_final[!is.na(bmi)]

imv_runs_final <- merge(imv_runs_final, patient_bmi_data_final, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
#imv_runs_final <- unique(imv_runs_final, by = c("hospitalization_id"))



################################################################################

hospitalization_table_part_five <- hospitalization[hospitalization_id %in% imv_runs_final$hospitalization_id]
patient_language <- patient_demographics[patient_id %in% hospitalization_table_part_five$patient_id]

# Step 1: Count and sort languages, excluding "English", Unknown, and sign language
language_counts <- patient_language[
  !language_category %in% c("english", "unknown or na", "sign language", "spanish"), 
  .N, 
  by = language_category
][order(-N)]
fwrite(language_counts, file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_non_english_language_counts.csv")))

# Get the top 5 most common languages
top_languages <- language_counts[1:5, language_category]

# Non-English-non-spanish Language
non_english_non_spanish_language <- patient_language[
  !language_category %in% c("english", "unknown or na", "spanish", "sign language"), 
  .N, 
  by = language_category
][order(-N)]

# Add top_five flag to patient_language
patient_language[, top_five := language_category %in% top_languages]

patient_language[, non_eng_non_span := language_category %in% non_english_non_spanish_language$language_category]

patient_language[, top_five_non_eng_non_spanish := fifelse(
  top_five == TRUE, 
  "top_five_non_eng_non_spanish",
  fifelse(language_category == "english", 
          "english", 
          fifelse(language_category == "spanish", 
                  "spanish", 
                  NA_character_))
)]

patient_language[, .N, by = top_five_non_eng_non_spanish][order(-N)]

patient_language[, non_eng := ifelse(language_category == "english", "english", "non_english")]

patient_language[, three_language_cat := fifelse(
  non_eng_non_span == TRUE, 
  "non_eng_non_span",
  fifelse(language_category == "english", 
          "english", 
          fifelse(language_category == "spanish", 
                  "spanish", 
                  NA_character_))
)]

#Merge Back
demographics_final <- merge(hospitalization_table_part_five, patient_language, by = "patient_id", all = TRUE)

# Social Vulnerability Metric
if (!"SVM_SCORE" %in% names(demographics_final)) {
  
  svm_url  <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/acortizmd/CLIF_Deep_Sedation_Language/main/code/SVM_ZIPCODE_SCORES_All%20States_All%20Counties_2025-07-03.csv"
  svm_file <- file.path(tempdir(), "SVM_ZIPCODE_SCORES_All_States_All_Counties_2025-07-03.csv")
  
  if (!file.exists(svm_file)) {
    download.file(svm_url, destfile = svm_file, mode = "wb")
  }
  
  svm_data <- fread(svm_file)
  
  svm_score <- svm_data[, .(ZIPCODE, SVM_SCORE)]
  setnames(svm_score, "ZIPCODE", "zipcode_five_digit")
  
  demographics_final[, zipcode_five_digit := sprintf("%05d", as.integer(zipcode_five_digit))]
  svm_score[, zipcode_five_digit := sprintf("%05d", as.integer(zipcode_five_digit))]
  
  demographics_final <- merge(
    demographics_final,
    svm_score,
    by = "zipcode_five_digit",
    all.x = TRUE
  )
}

#Clean Out Unknown Languages, Missing Demographic Info, and People Under 18 or over 120
demographics_clean_language <- demographics_final[
  language_category != "unknown or na" &
  language_category != "sign language"
]

demographics_clean_categories <- demographics_clean_language[
  sex_category != "unknown" &
  !is.na(SVM_SCORE) & SVM_SCORE != "" &
  !is.na(sex_category) & sex_category != "" &
  !is.na(race_category) & race_category != "" &
  !is.na(ethnicity_category) & ethnicity_category != ""
]

demographics_clean_age <- demographics_clean_categories[
  age_at_admission >= 18 & age_at_admission < 120
]


#Age Category
demographics_clean_age <- demographics_clean_age %>%
  mutate(age_category = case_when(
    age_at_admission >= 18 & age_at_admission < 35 ~ "18-34 Years",
    age_at_admission >= 35 & age_at_admission < 50 ~ "35-49 Years",
    age_at_admission >= 50 & age_at_admission < 65 ~ "50-64 Years",
    age_at_admission >= 65 & age_at_admission < 75 ~ "65-74 Years",
    age_at_admission >= 75 & age_at_admission < 85 ~ "75-84 Years",
    age_at_admission >= 85  ~ "85+ Years",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_ # Assign NA for any cases that don't fit
  ))
setDT(demographics_clean_age)

demographics_clean_final <- demographics_clean_age[, .(hospitalization_id, patient_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm, age_at_admission, age_category, admission_type_category, discharge_category, sex_category, race_category, ethnicity_category, death_dttm, language_category, top_five_non_eng_non_spanish, non_eng, three_language_cat, SVM_SCORE)]

demographics_clean_final[, race_category := as.character(race_category)]
demographics_clean_final[, race_category := fifelse(
  race_category %in% c("american indian or alaska native", "native hawaiian or other pacific islander", "unknown", "other"),
  "other/unknown",
  race_category
)]
demographics_clean_final[, ethnicity_category_final := fifelse(
  ethnicity_category %in% c("non-hispanic", "unknown"),
  "non-hispanic/unknown",
  ethnicity_category
)]

imv_runs_final <- merge(imv_runs_final, demographics_clean_final, by = c("hospitalization_id", "admission_dttm", "admission_type_category", "discharge_dttm"), all = TRUE)

###############################################################################
hospital_diagnosis_cohort <- hospital_diagnosis[hospitalization_id %in% imv_runs_final$hospitalization_id]

lookback <- hospital_diagnosis_cohort %>%
  mutate(diagnosis_code = str_replace_all(diagnosis_code, "[^a-zA-Z0-9]", "")) |>
  mutate(diagnosis_code = str_to_upper(diagnosis_code))

elixhauser_flags <- lookback %>%
  mutate(
    chf = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^I099|^I110|^I130|^I132|^I255|^I420|^I425|^I426|^I427|^I428|^I429|^I43|^I50|^P290"),
    carit = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^I441|^I442|^I443|^I456|^I459|^I47|^I48|^I49|^R000|^R001|^R008|^T821|^Z450|^Z950"),
    valv = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^A520|^I05|^I06|^I07|^I08|^I091|^I098|^I34|^I35|^I36|^I37|^I38|^I39|^Q230|^Q231|^Q232|^Q233|^Z952|^Z953|^Z954"),
    pcd = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^I26|^I27|^I280|^I288|^I289"),
    pvd = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^I70|^I71|^I731|^I738|^I739|^I771|^I790|^I792|^K551|^K558|^K559|^Z958|^Z959"),
    hypunc = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^I10"),
    hypc = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^I11|^I12|^I13|^I15"),
    para = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^G041|^G114|^G801|^G802|^G81|^G82|^G830|^G831|^G832|^G833|^G834|^G839"),
    ond = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^G10|^G11|^G12|^G13|^G20|^G21|^G22|^G254|^G255|^G312|^G318|^G319|^G32|^G35|^G36|^G37|^G40|^G41|^G931|^G934|^R470|^R56"),
    cpd = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^I278|^I279|^J40|^J41|^J42|^J43|^J44|^J45|^J46|^J47|^J60|^J61|^J62|^J63|^J64|^J65|^J66|^J67|^J684|^J701|^J703"),
    diabunc = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^E10[0-19]|^E11[0-19]|^E12[0-29]|^E13[0-39]|^E14[0-49]$"),
    diabc = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^E10[2-8]|^E11[2-8]|^E12[2-8]|^E13[2-8]|^E14[2-8]"),
    hypothy = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^E00|^E01|^E02|^E03|^E890"),
    rf = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^I120|^I131|^N18|^N19|^N250|^Z490|^Z491|^Z492|^Z940|^Z992"),
    ld = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^B18|^I85|^I864|^I982|^K70|^K711|^K713|^K714|^K715|^K717|^K72|^K73|^K74|^K760|^K762|^K763|^K764|^K765|^K766|^K767|^K768|^K769|^Z944"),
    pud = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^K257|^K259|^K267|^K269|^K277|^K279|^K287|^K289"),
    aids = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^B20|^B21|^B22|^B24"),
    lymph = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^C81|^C82|^C83|^C84|^C85|^C88|^C96|^C900|^C902"),
    metacanc = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^C77|^C78|^C79|^C80"),
    solidtum = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^C0[0-9]|^C1[0-4]|^C15|^C16|^C17|^C18|^C19|^C20|^C21|^C22|^C23|^C24|^C25|^C26|^C30|^C31|^C32|^C33|^C34|^C37|^C38|^C39|^C40|^C41|^C43|^C45|^C46|^C47|^C48|^C49|^C50|^C51|^C52|^C53|^C54|^C55|^C56|^C57|^C58|^C60|^C61|^C62|^C63|^C64|^C65|^C66|^C67|^C68|^C69|^C70|^C71|^C72|^C73|^C74|^C75|^C76|^C97"),
    rheumd = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^L940|^L941|^L943|^M05|^M06|^M08|^M120|^M123|^M30|^M310|^M311|^M312|^M313|^M32|^M33|^M34|^M35|^M45|^M461|^M468|^M469"),
    coag = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^D65|^D66|^D67|^D68|^D691|^D693|^D694|^D695|^D696"),
    obes = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^E66"),
    wloss = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^E40|^E41|^E42|^E43|^E44|^E45|^E46|^R634|^R64"),
    fed = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^E222|^E86|^E87"),
    blane = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^D500"),
    dane = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^D508|^D509|^D51|^D52|^D53"),
    alcohol = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^F10|^E52|^G621|^I426|^K292|^K700|^K703|^K709|^T51|^Z502|^Z714|^Z721"),
    drug = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^F1[1-6]|^F18|^F19|^Z715|^Z722"),
    psycho = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^F20|^F22|^F23|^F24|^F25|^F28|^F29|^F302|^F312|^F315"),
    depre = str_detect(diagnosis_code, "^F204|^F313|^F314|^F315|^F32|^F33|^F341|^F412|^F432")
  ) %>%
  group_by(hospitalization_id) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ max(.x, na.rm = TRUE)))

elixhauser <- elixhauser_flags %>%
  mutate(elixhauser_score =
           7 * chf + 5 * carit - 1 * valv + 4 * pcd + 2 * pvd +
           7 * para + 6 * ond + 3 * cpd + 5 * rf + 11 * ld +
           9 * lymph + 12 * metacanc + 4 * solidtum + 3 * coag -
           4 * obes + 6 * wloss + 5 * fed - 2 * blane - 2 * dane -
           7 * drug - 3 * depre)
setDT(elixhauser)

elixhauser_final <- elixhauser[, .(hospitalization_id, elixhauser_score)]

imv_runs_final <- merge(imv_runs_final, elixhauser_final, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)


###############################################################################

# RASS Assessment Table
pat_assess_rass <- patient_assessments[assessment_category == "rass"]
setorder(pat_assess_rass, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

pat_assess_rass_filt <- pat_assess_rass[hospitalization_id %in% imv_runs_final$hospitalization_id]

# Convert Numerical and Categorical RASS Values to Standard Number
pat_assess_rass_filt[, rass_value := fifelse(
  !is.na(numerical_value), # If numerical_value is present, prioritize it
  as.character(as.integer(numerical_value)), # Convert numerical_value to integer and then to character
  fifelse(
    grepl("^\\+?(-?5|-?4|-?3|-?2|-?1|0|1|2|3|4)$", categorical_value), # Check if categorical_value matches permissible values (with optional + or -)
    as.character(as.integer(sub("^\\+", "", categorical_value))), # Remove leading "+" if present, then convert to integer and then to character
    NA_character_ ))]

imv_runs_rass_simple <- imv_runs_final[run_id < 2]


# Merge imv_runs from part 8 with RASS filtered
hosp_time_rass <- merge(imv_runs_rass_simple, pat_assess_rass_filt, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

# Calculate Time Difference Between RASS Documentation and Begin IMV
hosp_time_rass[, time_to_first_rass := as.numeric(difftime(recorded_dttm, begin_imv, units = "hours"))]

# Determine RASS value closest to Beginning IMV
hosp_time_rass_closest <- hosp_time_rass[time_to_first_rass >= -1, 
                                         .SD[which.min(time_to_first_rass)], 
                                         by = hospitalization_id]

# Clean Out Those with RASS Values Not Documented within 8 hours of IMVs
time_to_first_rass_final <- hosp_time_rass_closest#[time_to_first_rass >= -1 & time_to_first_rass <= 8]
time_to_first_rass_final[time_to_first_rass < 0, time_to_first_rass := 0]
setnames(time_to_first_rass_final, "recorded_dttm", "first_rass_dttm")
time_to_first_rass_final <- time_to_first_rass_final[, .(hospitalization_id, time_to_first_rass)]


# Timestamps
rass_cohort_timestamps <- imv_runs_rass_simple[hospitalization_id %in% time_to_first_rass_final$hospitalization_id][, .(hospitalization_id, begin_imv, end_imv, imv_duration_hours_final)]

# Calculate start_time (begin_imv)
rass_cohort_timestamps[, start_time := as.POSIXct(begin_imv), by = hospitalization_id]

# Calculate end_time based on the condition for each hospitalization_id
rass_cohort_timestamps[, end_time := fifelse(
  imv_duration_hours_final >= 48,
  as.POSIXct(begin_imv) + hours(48),
  as.POSIXct(end_imv)
), by = hospitalization_id]

pat_assess_rass_cohort_clean <- pat_assess_rass_filt[hospitalization_id %in% time_to_first_rass_final$hospitalization_id]
setorder(pat_assess_rass_cohort_clean, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

#Clean Only for rass_value
total_timeline_rass <- merge(pat_assess_rass_cohort_clean, rass_cohort_timestamps, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)[, .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, rass_value, start_time, end_time)]

# Filter the table to retain rows where recorded_dttm is within the time range
total_timeline_rass_filt <- total_timeline_rass[recorded_dttm >= start_time & recorded_dttm <= end_time]

total_timeline_rass_filt <- total_timeline_rass_filt[!is.na(rass_value)]
total_timeline_rass_filt[, rass_value := as.numeric(rass_value)]

# Ensure data is sorted chronologically within each hospitalization
setorder(total_timeline_rass_filt, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

##Median RASS Values
rass_median_by_hosp <- total_timeline_rass_filt[, .(
  median_rass_cont = median(rass_value, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = hospitalization_id]
##

# Compute the time duration for which each RASS value persists
total_timeline_rass_filt[, lead_time := shift(recorded_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]

# If it's the last recorded RASS value, set duration to the difference between end_time and recorded_dttm
total_timeline_rass_filt[, rass_duration := as.numeric(difftime(lead_time, recorded_dttm, units = "hours"))]
total_timeline_rass_filt[is.na(rass_duration), rass_duration := as.numeric(difftime(end_time, recorded_dttm, units = "hours"))]

# Calculate the time-weighted sum of RASS values per hospitalization
rass_weighted_sum <- total_timeline_rass_filt[, .(rass_weighted = sum(rass_value * rass_duration, na.rm = TRUE)), by = hospitalization_id]

# Calculate total time spent under observation
rass_total_time <- total_timeline_rass_filt[, .(total_observed_time = sum(rass_duration, na.rm = TRUE)), by = hospitalization_id]

# Merge to get the final time-weighted RASS average
rass_calc <- merge(rass_weighted_sum, rass_total_time, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
rass_calc[, rass_weighted_avg := rass_weighted / total_observed_time]

# Define deep sedation based on the time-weighted RASS average
rass_calc[, deep_sedation_weighted := rass_weighted_avg <= -3]

# Merge with timestamps to get full dataset
rass_calc_timeline <- merge(rass_calc, rass_cohort_timestamps, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

# Set observation time (capped at 48 hours)
rass_calc_timeline[, observation_time := ifelse(imv_duration_hours_final < 48, imv_duration_hours_final, 48)]

rass_measurements <- total_timeline_rass_filt[, .(rass_count = .N), by = hospitalization_id]
rass_cumulative <- total_timeline_rass_filt[, .(rass_cumulative = sum(rass_value, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                                            by = hospitalization_id]
rass_cumulative_neg <- total_timeline_rass_filt[, .(
  rass_cumulative_neg = sum(ifelse(rass_value < 0, rass_value, 0), na.rm = TRUE)
), by = hospitalization_id]

rass_calc_timeline_merge <- merge(rass_calc_timeline, rass_measurements, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
rass_calc_timeline_merge_two <- merge(rass_calc_timeline_merge, rass_cumulative, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
rass_calc_timeline_merge_three <- merge(rass_calc_timeline_merge_two, rass_cumulative_neg, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
rass_calc_timeline_merge_four <- merge(rass_calc_timeline_merge_three, rass_median_by_hosp, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

# Compute RASS frequency (number of RASS values per observation period)
rass_calc_timeline_merge_four[, rass_frequency_hrs := observation_time / rass_count]
 
rass_calc_timeline_merge_four[, rass_unweighted_avg := rass_cumulative / rass_count]

# Define deep sedation based on the time-weighted RASS average
rass_calc_timeline_merge_four[, deep_sedation_unweighted := rass_unweighted_avg < -3]

# Define deep sedation based on median RASS
rass_calc_timeline_merge_four[, median_rass_binary := median_rass_cont <= -3]

# Sedation Index Score
rass_calc_timeline_merge_four[, sedation_index_score := rass_cumulative_neg / rass_count]

# Total Number of RASS Values -3 or lower
rass_counts <- total_timeline_rass_filt[rass_value <= -3, .N, by = hospitalization_id]
setnames(rass_counts, "N", "rass_below_minus_3_count")

rass_calc_timeline_merge_five <- merge(rass_calc_timeline_merge_four, rass_counts, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

rass_calc_timeline_merge_six <- merge(rass_calc_timeline_merge_five, time_to_first_rass_final, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

# Apply filtering
rass_calc_timeline_filt <- rass_calc_timeline_merge_six[, .(hospitalization_id, rass_weighted_avg, rass_unweighted_avg, rass_frequency_hrs, time_to_first_rass, rass_count, deep_sedation_weighted, deep_sedation_unweighted, rass_below_minus_3_count, median_rass_binary, median_rass_cont, sedation_index_score)]
setnafill(rass_calc_timeline_filt, cols = "rass_below_minus_3_count", fill = 0)

# Updated IMV
#xx_part_six_filt <- part_six_imv_runs[hospitalization_id %in% rass_calc_timeline_filt$hospitalization_id]

imv_runs_final <- merge(imv_runs_final, rass_calc_timeline_filt, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

#part_seven_imv_runs[imv_duration_hours_short>= 0, ] #JHU Patch
#part_seven_imv_runs <- unique(part_seven_imv_runs, by = c("hospitalization_id"))

#Hospital_icu_id
set(imv_runs_final, j = "hospital_icu_id", 
    value = paste(imv_runs_final$hospital_id, 
                  imv_runs_final$icu_imv, sep = "_"))

###############################################################################


# Start with a copy so the original table stays unchanged
imv_runs_cleaned <- copy(imv_runs_final)

# Step 0: initial count
n_start <- nrow(imv_runs_cleaned)

n_hospitalizations <- nrow(hospitalization)
n_removed_imv <- n_hospitalizations - n_start

# Step 1: Remove Trach Patients
imv_runs_step1 <- imv_runs_cleaned[trached_at_admission != TRUE]
n_after_step1 <- nrow(imv_runs_step1)
n_removed_step1 <- n_start - n_after_step1

# Step 2: remove reintubations (keep only run_id < 2)
imv_runs_step2 <- imv_runs_step1[run_id < 2]
n_after_step2 <- nrow(imv_runs_step2)
n_removed_step2 <- n_after_step1 - n_after_step2

# Step 3: remove OSH intubations
imv_runs_step3 <- imv_runs_step2[osh_intubation != TRUE | is.na(osh_intubation)]
n_after_step3 <- nrow(imv_runs_step3)
n_removed_step3 <- n_after_step2 - n_after_step3

# Step 4: remove IMV duration < 4 hours
imv_runs_step4 <- imv_runs_step3[imv_duration_hours_final >= 4]
n_after_step4 <- nrow(imv_runs_step4)
n_removed_step4 <- n_after_step3 - n_after_step4

# Step 4B: remove for not reaching ICU within 4 hours
imv_runs_step4b <- imv_runs_step4[time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours <= 4]
n_after_step4b <- nrow(imv_runs_step4b)
n_removed_step4b <- n_after_step4 - n_after_step4b

#Step 5: Removed for no RASS within 4 hours
imv_runs_step5 <- imv_runs_step4b[time_to_first_rass >= -1 & time_to_first_rass <= 4]
n_after_step5 <- nrow(imv_runs_step5)
n_removed_step5 <- n_after_step4b - n_after_step5

#Step 6: Removed for RASS frequency less than 12 hours
imv_runs_step6 <- imv_runs_step5[rass_frequency_hrs <= 12]
n_after_step6 <- nrow(imv_runs_step6)
n_removed_step6 <- n_after_step5 - n_after_step6

# Step 7: removed for missing bmi data
imv_runs_step7 <- imv_runs_step6[!is.na(bmi)]
n_after_step7 <- nrow(imv_runs_step7)
n_removed_step7 <- n_after_step6 - n_after_step7

# Step 7b: removed for missing hospital_icu data
imv_runs_step7b <- imv_runs_step7[!is.na(hospital_icu_id)]
n_after_step7b <- nrow(imv_runs_step7b)
n_removed_step7b <- n_after_step7 - n_after_step7b

#Step 8: Removed for missing language
imv_runs_step8 <- imv_runs_step7[!is.na(language_category) & language_category != "unknown"]
n_after_step8 <- nrow(imv_runs_step8)
n_removed_step8 <- n_after_step7 - n_after_step8

#Step 9: Removed for blank/missing ethnicity, race, sex categories
imv_runs_step9 <- imv_runs_step8[
  !is.na(ethnicity_category) &
  !is.na(race_category) &
  !is.na(sex_category) &
  tolower(sex_category) != "unknown"
]
n_after_step9 <- nrow(imv_runs_step9)
n_removed_step9 <- n_after_step8 - n_after_step9

#Step 10: Removed for Age Less than 18 or over 120
imv_runs_step10 <- imv_runs_step9[
  !is.na(age_at_admission) &
  age_at_admission >= 18 &
  age_at_admission <= 120
]
n_after_step10 <- nrow(imv_runs_step10)
n_removed_step10 <- n_after_step9 - n_after_step10

#Step 11: Removed for missing Elixhauser data
imv_runs_step11 <- imv_runs_step10[!is.na(elixhauser_score) & elixhauser_score != ""]
n_after_step11 <- nrow(imv_runs_step11)
n_removed_step11 <- n_after_step10 - n_after_step11

imv_runs_final_clean <- imv_runs_step11

# Tabulation of exclusions
filter_tab_final <- data.table(
  step = c(
    "Total Hospitalizations",
    "Initial",
    "Remove for trach prior to admission",
    "Removed run_id >= 2",
    "Removed for osh_intubation",
    "Removed imv_duration_hours < 4",
    "Removed for delayed transfer to ICU",
    "Removed for time to first RASS",
    "Removed for RASS frequency",
    "Removed for missing BMI data",
    "Removed for missing icu/hospital data",
    "Removed for missing language",
    "Removed for blank/missing sex, race, ethnicity, svm",
    "Removed for age",
    "Removed for missing Elixhauser data",
    "Final"
  ),
  n_remaining = c(
    n_hospitalizations,
    n_start,
    n_after_step1,
    n_after_step2,
    n_after_step3,
    n_after_step4,
    n_after_step4b,
    n_after_step5,
    n_after_step6,
    n_after_step7,
    n_after_step7b,
    n_after_step8,
    n_after_step9,
    n_after_step10,
    n_after_step11,
    n_after_step11
  ),
  n_removed_this_step = c(
    0,
    n_removed_imv,
    n_removed_step1,
    n_removed_step2,
    n_removed_step3,
    n_removed_step4,
    n_removed_step4b,
    n_removed_step5,
    n_removed_step6,
    n_removed_step7,
    n_removed_step7b,
    n_removed_step8,
    n_removed_step9,
    n_removed_step10,
    n_removed_step11,
    0
  )
)

filter_tab_final

fwrite(filter_tab_final, file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_cohort_cleaning_summary.csv")))
################################################################################

# Calculate HFDs, VFDs, ICUFDs
# Correct any death_dttm errors first
imv_runs_final_clean[death_dttm < discharge_dttm & discharge_category == "expired",
  death_dttm := discharge_dttm]

imv_runs_final_clean[is.na(death_dttm) & discharge_category == "expired",
  death_dttm := discharge_dttm]

# Now create date variables AFTER corrections
imv_runs_final_clean[, begin_imv_date := as.Date(begin_imv)]
```
