```{r}
imv_runs_final_clean[, death_date := as.Date(death_dttm)]
imv_runs_final_clean[, discharge_date := as.Date(discharge_dttm)]
imv_runs_final_clean[, admission_date := as.Date(admission_dttm)]

# Died during admission flag using dates
imv_runs_final_clean[, death_during_admission :=
  !is.na(death_date) &
  death_date >= admission_date &
  death_date <= discharge_date]

# -----------------------------
# 28-day window with death truncation
# -----------------------------
imv_runs_final_clean[, window_start := begin_imv_date]
imv_runs_final_clean[, window_end_28 := begin_imv_date + 27]

imv_runs_final_clean[, eligible_end := fifelse(
  !is.na(death_date) & death_date <= window_end_28,
  death_date,
  window_end_28
)]

imv_runs_final_clean[, eligible_days := as.integer(eligible_end - window_start) + 1L]

# Use hospital_days to determine days in 28-day window
days_in_window <- merge(
  hospital_days,
  imv_runs_final_clean[, .(
    patient_id,
    cohort_hospitalization_id = hospitalization_id,
    run_id,
    window_start,
    eligible_end
  )],
  by = "patient_id",
  allow.cartesian = TRUE
)[
  calendar_date >= window_start & calendar_date <= eligible_end
]

# Summarize 28-day counts and merge back
free_day_counts <- days_in_window[, .(
  hospital_days_28 = uniqueN(calendar_date),
  icu_days_28      = uniqueN(calendar_date[icu_day == TRUE]),
  vent_days_28     = uniqueN(calendar_date[vent_day == TRUE])
), by = .(patient_id, cohort_hospitalization_id, run_id)]

imv_runs_final_clean <- merge(
  imv_runs_final_clean,
  free_day_counts,
  by.x = c("patient_id", "hospitalization_id", "run_id"),
  by.y = c("patient_id", "cohort_hospitalization_id", "run_id"),
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Replace missing 28-day counts with 0
for (col in c("hospital_days_28", "icu_days_28", "vent_days_28")) {
  imv_runs_final_clean[is.na(get(col)), (col) := 0L]
}

imv_runs_final_clean[, hospital_free_days_28 := eligible_days - hospital_days_28]
imv_runs_final_clean[, icu_free_days_28      := eligible_days - icu_days_28]
imv_runs_final_clean[, vent_free_days_28     := eligible_days - vent_days_28]

# -----------------------------
# 6-month hospital-free days
# -----------------------------

# Define 6-month calendar window
imv_runs_final_clean[, window_end_6mo := begin_imv_date %m+% months(6) - days(1)]

# Truncate at death if death occurs within 6 months
imv_runs_final_clean[, eligible_end_6mo := fifelse(
  !is.na(death_date) & death_date <= window_end_6mo,
  death_date,
  window_end_6mo
)]

# Number of eligible days in 6-month window
imv_runs_final_clean[, eligible_days_6mo := as.integer(eligible_end_6mo - begin_imv_date) + 1L]

# Pull all patient hospital-days within 6-month window
days_in_window_6mo <- merge(
  hospital_days,
  imv_runs_final_clean[, .(
    patient_id,
    cohort_hospitalization_id = hospitalization_id,
    run_id,
    window_start_6mo = begin_imv_date,
    eligible_end_6mo
  )],
  by = "patient_id",
  allow.cartesian = TRUE
)[
  calendar_date >= window_start_6mo & calendar_date <= eligible_end_6mo
]

# Count total hospital days within 6 months
hospital_free_day_counts_6mo <- days_in_window_6mo[, .(
  hospital_days_6mo = uniqueN(calendar_date)
), by = .(patient_id, cohort_hospitalization_id, run_id)]

# Merge back
imv_runs_final_clean <- merge(
  imv_runs_final_clean,
  hospital_free_day_counts_6mo,
  by.x = c("patient_id", "hospitalization_id", "run_id"),
  by.y = c("patient_id", "cohort_hospitalization_id", "run_id"),
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Replace missing with 0
imv_runs_final_clean[is.na(hospital_days_6mo), hospital_days_6mo := 0L]

# Calculate 6-month hospital-free days
imv_runs_final_clean[, hospital_free_days_6mo := eligible_days_6mo - hospital_days_6mo]


###28-Day Mortality
imv_runs_final_clean[, mortality_28day := !is.na(death_date) & death_date <= (begin_imv_date + 27)]

final_cohort_imv_runs <- imv_runs_final_clean

```


# PART FOUR: LAPS2
```{r}

#Prep labs, vitals, gcs tables
#Labs
labs_time_dependent_2 <- labs_time_dependent[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id]

#Filtered Vitals
time_dependent_vitals <- c("sbp", "dbp", "map", "spo2", "temp_c", "heart_rate", "respiratory_rate")
vitals_time_dependent <- vitals[vital_category %in% time_dependent_vitals & hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id]

#Filtered Patient Assessments
patient_assess_gcs_time_dependent <- patient_assessments[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & assessment_category == "gcs_total"]
pat_assess_gcs_time_dependent <- patient_assess_gcs_time_dependent[, .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, assessment_category, numerical_value)]
#GCS
pat_assess_gcs_time_dependent_wide <- dcast(pat_assess_gcs_time_dependent, 
                   hospitalization_id + recorded_dttm ~ assessment_category, 
                   value.var = "numerical_value", 
                   fun.aggregate = mean,  # Aggregate duplicates using mean
                   fill = NA)  # Fill missing values with NA
setorder(pat_assess_gcs_time_dependent_wide, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

pat_assess_gcs_time_dependent_wide[, recorded_dttm := as.POSIXct(recorded_dttm, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = time_zone)]

# LAPS2 Score Part 1: Encounter Data
### change to hospital_icu
clif_adt_hospital <-  adt |>
  mutate(location_category = factor(location_category,
                                    levels = (c("icu", "stepdown", "ward", "ed", "procedural", "other")),                                    ordered = TRUE)) |> 
  group_by(hospitalization_id) |> 
  arrange(hospitalization_id, location_category, in_dttm) |> 
  
  # first one will be ICU
  slice_head(n=1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id,
         hospital = hospital_id)


clif_adt_admit <-  adt |>
  group_by(hospitalization_id) |> 
  arrange(hospitalization_id, in_dttm) |> 
  slice_head(n=1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id,
         first_location_category = location_category)
  

# fixing clif_labs to recorded_dttm
if ("lab_collect_dttm" %in% colnames(labs_time_dependent)) {
  labs_time_dependent <- labs_time_dependent |> rename(recorded_dttm = lab_collect_dttm)
}

df_encounter_laps2_temp1 <- hospitalization |> 
  left_join(patient_demographics) |> 
  left_join(clif_adt_hospital) |> 
  left_join(clif_adt_admit) |> 
  
  
  # make dead/hospice column
  mutate(
    death_or_hospice_01 = fcase(
      discharge_category %in% 
        c("hospice", "dead", "expired", "died", "Hospice", "Expired")       , 1,
      default                                         = 0
    ),
    
    death_or_hospice_01       = as.factor(death_or_hospice_01),
    
    # make 24 hours after admission variable (to collect data from first 24 hours)
    dt_24hours_after_admit    = admission_dttm + hours(24),
    
    # ED binary variable
    ed_admit_01               = fifelse(first_location_category == "ed", 1, 0, 0),
          # I think we used categorical in Rachel Kohn paper... Pat uses ED y/n
          # admission source OR you can use ED variable
    # Admit source variable (use one or the other)
    # admission_type_category      = as.factor(admission_type_category),  don't have this yet
    
    # sex_category
    female_01                 = fifelse(str_detect(sex_category, "female"), 1, 0, 0),
    
  )


# LAPS2 Score Part 2:  Fix Anion Gap & Troponin_t

if(any(labs_time_dependent$lab_category == "anion_gap", na.rm = TRUE)){
  
  print("you already have anion gap")
  message("we are going to remove anion_gap and recreate it for you")
  message("this way... all our analyses are the same")
  
  labs_time_dependent <- labs_time_dependent |> 
    filter(lab_category != "anion_gap")

    print("Anion gap removed... please proceed!!")
  
} else {
  
  print("no anion_gap found... we will make one for you!!")
  
  
}

if(any(labs_time_dependent$lab_category == "troponin_t")){
  
  print("you already have trop_t")
  message("we are going to change to trop_i levels")
  
  labs_time_dependent <- labs_time_dependent |> 
    
    mutate(lab_value_numeric = fcase(
      lab_category == "troponin_t",
      lab_value_numeric / 1000,
      default = lab_value_numeric
    )) |> 
    
    mutate(lab_category = fcase(
      lab_category == "troponin_t",
      "troponin_i",
      rep_len(TRUE, length(lab_category)), lab_category
    )) 
    
    print("Troponin fixed ... please proceed!!")
  
} else {
  
  print("no need to fix troponin !!")
  
}

# Set a time tolerance, e.g., 1 hour
time_tolerance <- hours(1)

# Create recorded_date from recorded_dttm
labs_time_dependent <- labs_time_dependent %>%
  mutate(recorded_date = as.Date(recorded_dttm))

# Separate the lab values for sodium, bicarbonate, and chloride, and create recorded_date
sodium_df <- labs_time_dependent %>%
  filter(lab_category == "sodium") %>%
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, recorded_date, sodium = lab_value_numeric,
         lab_order_dttm, lab_result_dttm)

bicarbonate_df <- labs_time_dependent %>%
  filter(lab_category == "bicarbonate") %>%
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, recorded_date, bicarbonate = lab_value_numeric)

chloride_df <- labs_time_dependent %>%
  filter(lab_category == "chloride") %>%
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, recorded_date, chloride = lab_value_numeric)

# Perform a join by clif_hospitalizations_joined_id and recorded_date to limit the join size
anion_gap_df <- sodium_df %>%
  full_join(bicarbonate_df, by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_date")) %>%
  full_join(chloride_df, by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_date")) %>%
  
  # Calculate the time differences between recorded_dttm values
  mutate(time_diff_sodium_bicarbonate = abs(difftime(recorded_dttm.x, recorded_dttm.y, units = "mins")),
         time_diff_sodium_chloride = abs(difftime(recorded_dttm.x, recorded_dttm, units = "mins")),
         
         # Apply the time tolerance (1 hour)
         within_tolerance_bicarbonate = time_diff_sodium_bicarbonate <= time_tolerance,
         within_tolerance_chloride = time_diff_sodium_chloride <= time_tolerance) %>%
  
  # Filter to retain rows where the time differences are within the tolerance
  filter(within_tolerance_bicarbonate & within_tolerance_chloride) %>%
  
  # Calculate the anion gap: sodium - (bicarbonate + chloride)
  mutate(anion_gap = sodium - (bicarbonate + chloride)) %>%
  
  # Select the relevant columns
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm.x, anion_gap, lab_order_dttm, lab_result_dttm, recorded_date)

# Rename recorded_dttm.x to recorded_dttm for consistency
anion_gap_df <- anion_gap_df %>%
  mutate(reference_unit = "meq/l") |> 
  mutate(lab_name = "anion gap") |> 
  mutate(lab_category = "anion_gap") |>
  rename(lab_value_numeric = anion_gap) |> 
  rename(recorded_dttm = recorded_dttm.x)


labs_time_dependent <- labs_time_dependent |> 
              bind_rows(anion_gap_df)

# LAPS2 Score Part 3: Fix/Prep Labs for LAPS2 Risk Prediction (Prelaps)
############
# Pre-Laps... want the most recent within 24 hours of admission
############

df_pre_laps2_prep1 <- 
  df_encounter_laps2_temp1 |> 
  left_join(labs_time_dependent |> 
              filter(lab_category %in% c("anion_gap",
                                         "bicarbonate", # FROM BMP
                                         "bun",
                                         "creatinine",
                                         "sodium")),
            
            # join only if between the first 24 hours
            by = join_by(hospitalization_id, 
                         dt_24hours_after_admit >= recorded_dttm) 
  ) |> 
  # Min/Max
  #     bun            max
  #     creatinine     min
  #     bun/cr         max
  #     bun/cr         most recent (prelaps)
  #     anion_gap      max
  #     bicarbonate min
  #     ag/bicarb      most recent (prelaps)
  #     sodium         min
  #     sodium         most recent (prelaps)
       
  group_by(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, lab_category) |> 
  # using obs lets you get away with duplicates when going wider and can fix later!
  mutate(obs = row_number()) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, obs),
    names_from = lab_category,
    values_from = lab_value_numeric,
    # names_prefix = "lab_wide_",
    # values_fill = NA
  ) |>
  
  # Quick min/max for duplicates at the SAME time
  dplyr::select(-obs) |> 
  distinct() 

# find the duplicates by recorded_dttm
df_pre_laps2_prep2 <- df_pre_laps2_prep1 |> 
  arrange(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm) |> 
  group_by(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm) |>
  # mutate(n = n()) |> 
  # filter(n > 1) |> 
  summarise(
    bun               = fmax(bun, na.rm = TRUE),
    creatinine        = fmin(creatinine, na.rm = TRUE),
    bicarbonate       = fmin(bicarbonate, na.rm = TRUE),
    anion_gap         = fmax(anion_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
    sodium            = fmin(sodium, na.rm = TRUE),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  
  # replace inf with NAs
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(hospitalization_id), ~ na_if(.x, is.infinite(.x)))) |> 
  
  # get rid of duplicate rows
  distinct() |> 
  
  # order appropriately for when getting last labs for "most recent"
  arrange(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm) |> 
  
  # carry forward
  group_by(hospitalization_id) |> 
  
  # fill in ... its only the first 24 hours so its ok
  fill(c(bun,
         creatinine,
         bicarbonate,
         anion_gap,
         sodium), 
       .direction = "downup") |>
  
  # ? time shift if needed
  
  # get the most recent lab (aka last) based on recorded_dttm
    mutate(
      bun_recent                = flast(bun, na.rm = TRUE),
      creatinine_recent         = flast(creatinine, na.rm = TRUE),
      bicarbonate_recent        = flast(bicarbonate, na.rm = TRUE),
      anion_gap_recent          = flast(anion_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
      sodium_recent             = flast(sodium, na.rm = TRUE)
           ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, ends_with("recent")) |> 

  # final pre-laps labs needed
  mutate(
    # make ratios
    sodium              = sodium_recent,
    bun_cr_ratio        = bun_recent/creatinine_recent,
    ag_hco3_ratio       = (anion_gap_recent/bicarbonate_recent)*1000
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(-ends_with("recent")) |> 
  
  # replace inf with NAs (sometimes it happens when divided by zero)
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(hospitalization_id), ~ na_if(.x, is.infinite(.x)))) |> 
  
  distinct()
        
 df_pre_laps_merging <- df_pre_laps2_prep2 |> 
   left_join(
     df_encounter_laps2_temp1 |> 
       dplyr::select(
         hospitalization_id,
         admission_dttm,
         age = age_at_admission,
         female_01,
         ed_admit_01,
         # admission_type_category,
         death_or_hospice_01
       ) |> 
       distinct(),
     join_by(hospitalization_id)
   ) |> 
   mutate(
    age_cat = case_when(
      age >= 85 ~ 5,
      age >= 75 ~ 4,
      age >= 65 ~ 3,
      age >= 40 ~ 2,
      TRUE ~ 1
    )
  ) |> 
   mutate(
      # impute to normal (8)
    bun_cr_ratio = fifelse(is.na(bun_cr_ratio), 8, bun_cr_ratio),
     
    buncreat_cat = case_when(
      bun_cr_ratio        >= 24 ~ 4,
      bun_cr_ratio        >= 16 ~ 3,
      bun_cr_ratio        < 8   ~ 2,
      TRUE                      ~ 1
    )
  ) |> 
     mutate(
      # impute to normal (135)
    sodium = fifelse(is.na(sodium), 135, sodium),
    na_cat = case_when(
      sodium            >= 155  ~ 7,
      sodium            >= 149  ~ 6,
      sodium            >= 146  ~ 5,
      sodium            >= 132  ~ 4,
      sodium            >= 129  ~ 3,
      sodium            < 129   ~ 2,
      TRUE                      ~ 1
    )
  ) |> 
     mutate(
      # impute to normal (200)
    ag_hco3_ratio = fifelse(is.na(ag_hco3_ratio), 200, ag_hco3_ratio),
    aghco3_cat = case_when(
      ag_hco3_ratio        >= 600  ~ 4,
      ag_hco3_ratio        >= 400  ~ 3,
      ag_hco3_ratio        < 200   ~ 2,
      TRUE                         ~ 1,
    )
  )
 
 # logistic regression to obtain p(death/hospice)
 lr_model <-
  glm(
    death_or_hospice_01 ~
      age +
      female_01 +
      ed_admit_01 +
      bun_cr_ratio +
      sodium +
      ag_hco3_ratio,
    family = "binomial",
    data   = df_pre_laps_merging
  )

tidy(lr_model)
pR2(lr_model)["McFadden"]

df_pre_laps_final  <- df_pre_laps_merging |> 
  mutate(p_death = predict(lr_model, df_pre_laps_merging, type = "response")) |> 
  mutate(
    high_risk = case_when(
      p_death >= 0.06 ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )) %>%
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, p_death, high_risk)

# LAPS2 Score Part 4: Prep laps2 labs ALL
##~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
# LAPS2 time
##~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 
df_encounter_laps2_temp2 <- df_encounter_laps2_temp1[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id]
labs_time_dependent_2 <- labs_time_dependent[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id]

df_laps2_prep1 <- 
  df_encounter_laps2_temp2 |> 
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  # slice_head(n=1000) |> 
  left_join(labs_time_dependent_2 |> 
              filter(lab_category %in% c("albumin",
                                     "anion_gap",
                                     "bilirubin_total",
                                     "bun",
                                     "bicarbonate",
                                     "creatinine",
                                     "glucose_serum",
                                     # "hematocrit",
                                     "hemoglobin",
                                     "lactate",
                                     "pco2_arterial",
                                     "po2_arterial",
                                     "ph_arterial",
                                     "platelet_count",
                                     "so2_arterial",
                                     "sodium",
                                     "troponin_i",
                                     "wbc")) |> 
              dplyr::select(-lab_order_dttm),
            
            # join only if between the first 24 hours
            by = join_by(hospitalization_id)) |> 
  # making all hemoglobin into hematocrits
  mutate(lab_value_numeric = fifelse(lab_category == "hemoglobin", lab_value_numeric*3, lab_value_numeric)) |> 
  mutate(lab_category = fifelse(lab_category == "hemoglobin", "hematocrit", lab_category)) |> 
  mutate(lab_category = fifelse(lab_category == "lactate", "lactic_acid", lab_category)) |> 

    # using obs lets you get away with duplicates when going wider and can fix later!
  group_by(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, lab_category) |> 
  mutate(obs = row_number()) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  
  # pivot wider to get columns
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, obs),
    names_from = lab_category,
    values_from = lab_value_numeric,
    # names_prefix = "lab_wide_",
    # values_fill = NA
  ) |>
  
  # Quick min/max for duplicates at the SAME time
  dplyr::select(-obs) |> 
  mutate(lab_date = date(recorded_dttm)) |> 
  distinct() 

#ni_tic()
# find the duplicates by day
df_laps2_prep2 <- df_laps2_prep1 |>
  # arrange(clif_hospitalizations_joined_id, recorded_dttm) |>
  group_by(hospitalization_id, lab_date) |>
  # mutate(n = n()) |>
  # filter(n > 1) |>
  summarise(
    albumin             = fmin(albumin, na.rm = TRUE),
    anion_gap           = fmax(anion_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
    bilirubin_total     = fmax(bilirubin_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    bun                 = fmax(bun, na.rm = TRUE),
    bicarbonate         = fmin(bicarbonate, na.rm = TRUE),
    creatinine          = fmax(creatinine, na.rm = TRUE),
    glucose_serum       = fmin(glucose_serum, na.rm = TRUE),
    hematocrit          = fmax(hematocrit, na.rm = TRUE),
    lactic_acid         = fmax(lactic_acid, na.rm = TRUE),
    pco2_arterial       = fmax(pco2_arterial, na.rm = TRUE),
    po2_arterial        = fmax(po2_arterial, na.rm = TRUE),
    ph_arterial         = fmin(ph_arterial, na.rm = TRUE),
    platelet_count      = fmin(platelet_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    so2_arterial        = fmin(so2_arterial, na.rm = TRUE),
    sodium              = fmin(sodium, na.rm = TRUE),
    troponin            = fmax(troponin_i, na.rm = TRUE),
    wbc                 = fmin(wbc, na.rm = TRUE
    ), 

    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  
    # bun_cr_ratio
  mutate(
    bun_cr_ratio = bun / creatinine
  ) |> 
  
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(hospitalization_id), ~ na_if(.x, is.infinite(.x)))) |> 
  # get rid of duplicate rows
  distinct() 



# LAPS2 Score Part 5: Labs day one for cohort

df_laps2_dayone_prep1 <- 
  df_encounter_laps2_temp2 |> 
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm, dt_24hours_after_admit) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  left_join(labs_time_dependent_2 |> 
              filter(lab_category %in% c("albumin",
                                     "anion_gap",
                                     "bilirubin_total",
                                     "bun",
                                     "bicarbonate",
                                     "creatinine",
                                     "glucose_serum",
                                     # "hematocrit",
                                     "hemoglobin",
                                     "lactate",
                                     "pco2_arterial",
                                     "po2_arterial",
                                     "ph_arterial",
                                     "platelet_count",
                                     "so2_arterial",
                                     "sodium",
                                     "troponin_i",
                                     "wbc")) |>            
              dplyr::select(-lab_order_dttm),
            
            # join only if between the first 24 hours
            by = join_by(hospitalization_id, 
                         dt_24hours_after_admit >= recorded_dttm)
  ) |> 

  # making all hemoglobin into hematocrits
  mutate(lab_value_numeric = fifelse(lab_category == "hemoglobin", lab_value_numeric*3, lab_value_numeric)) |> 
  mutate(lab_category = fifelse(lab_category == "hemoglobin", "hematocrit", lab_category)) |> 
  mutate(lab_category = fifelse(lab_category == "lactate", "lactic_acid", lab_category)) |> 
  
  group_by(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, lab_category) |> 
  # using obs lets you get away with duplicates when going wider and can fix later!
  mutate(obs = row_number()) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  
  # pivot wider to get columns
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, obs, admission_dttm),
    names_from = lab_category,
    values_from = lab_value_numeric,
    # names_prefix = "lab_wide_",
    # values_fill = NA
  ) |>
  
  # Quick min/max for duplicates at the SAME time
  dplyr::select(-obs) |> 
  distinct() 

# get min/max
df_laps2_dayone_prep2 <- df_laps2_dayone_prep1 |>
  arrange(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm) |> 
  
  # filter out those without a recorded_dttm so we don't add a date later
  filter(!is.na(recorded_dttm)) |> 
  # if we make "lab_date" the encounter date... then we are switching all labs within 24hr of admission to the "day 1" in a sneaky fashion
  mutate(lab_date = date(admission_dttm)) |> # make it all the same day 1
  group_by(hospitalization_id, lab_date) |>
  # mutate(n = n()) |>
  # filter(n > 1) |>
  summarise(
    albumin             = fmin(albumin, na.rm = TRUE),
    anion_gap           = fmax(anion_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
    bilirubin_total     = fmax(bilirubin_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    bun                 = fmax(bun, na.rm = TRUE),
    bicarbonate         = fmin(bicarbonate, na.rm = TRUE),
    creatinine          = fmax(creatinine, na.rm = TRUE),
    glucose_serum       = fmin(glucose_serum, na.rm = TRUE),
    hematocrit          = fmax(hematocrit, na.rm = TRUE),
    lactic_acid         = fmax(lactic_acid, na.rm = TRUE),
    pco2_arterial       = fmax(pco2_arterial, na.rm = TRUE),
    po2_arterial        = fmax(po2_arterial, na.rm = TRUE),
    ph_arterial         = fmin(ph_arterial, na.rm = TRUE),
    platelet_count      = fmin(platelet_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    so2_arterial        = fmin(so2_arterial, na.rm = TRUE),
    sodium              = fmin(sodium, na.rm = TRUE),
    troponin            = fmax(troponin_i, na.rm = TRUE),
    wbc                 = fmin(wbc, na.rm = TRUE
    ),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  
    # bun_cr_ratio
  mutate(
    bun_cr_ratio = bun / creatinine
  ) |> 
  
    # replace inf with NAs
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(hospitalization_id), ~ na_if(.x, is.infinite(.x)))) |> 

    # get rid of duplicate rows
  distinct() 



# switch out the day 1 stuff 
df_laps2_final <- df_laps2_prep2 |> anti_join(df_laps2_dayone_prep2 |> 
                              dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, lab_date)) |> 
  bind_rows(df_laps2_dayone_prep2) |> 
  arrange(hospitalization_id, lab_date) |> 
  

  # filter out NA for lab date
  filter(!is.na(lab_date))


# LAPS2 Score Part 6: GCS Fix

df_gcs_merge_ready <- pat_assess_gcs_time_dependent_wide |>
  mutate(vital_value = case_when(
    gcs_total %in% c(14, 15)                ~ 1,
    gcs_total %in% c(8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13)  ~ 3,
    gcs_total %in% c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)      ~ 4,
    TRUE                                    ~ NA   # we account for this when doing the points later
  )) |>
  mutate(vital_category = "gcs") |> 
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id,
         vital_category,
         recorded_dttm,
         vital_value,
         )


df_vitals_gcs <- vitals_time_dependent |>
              filter(vital_category %in% c("temp_c",
                                       "sbp",
                                       "spo2",
                                       "heart_rate",
                                       "respiratory_rate")) |>
              # dplyr::select(-meas_site_name) |> 
              
                          # get gcs in there now
              bind_rows(df_gcs_merge_ready)


# LAPS2 Score Part 7: Combine Vitals All and GCS

df_laps2_vitals_prep1 <- 
  df_encounter_laps2_temp1 |> 
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm) |>
  distinct() |> 
  left_join(df_vitals_gcs,
            
            # join by the encounter ID
            by = join_by(hospitalization_id)) |> 
  
    group_by(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, vital_category) |> 
  # using obs lets you get away with duplicates when going wider and can fix later!
  mutate(obs = row_number()) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, obs),
    names_from = vital_category,
    values_from = vital_value,
    # names_prefix = "vital_wide_",
    # values_fill = NA
  ) |>
  
  #fixing temp 
  mutate(temp = (temp_c * (9/5)) + 32) |> 
  
  #renaming resp
  rename(resp = respiratory_rate) |> 
  
  # Quick min/max for duplicates at the SAME time
  dplyr::select(-obs) |> 
  distinct() 

# find the duplicates by day
df_laps2_vitals_prep2 <- df_laps2_vitals_prep1 |>
  arrange(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm) |>
  mutate(vital_date = date(recorded_dttm)) |> 
  group_by(hospitalization_id, vital_date) |>
  # mutate(n = n()) |>
  # filter(n > 1) |>
  summarise(
    temp                = fmin(temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    sbp                 = fmin(sbp, na.rm = TRUE),
    spo2                = fmin(spo2, na.rm = TRUE),
    heart_rate               = fmax(heart_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    resp                = fmax(resp, na.rm = TRUE),
    gcs                 = fmax(gcs, na.rm = TRUE),  # remember the groupings... higher is lower gcs
    # shock_index         = fmax(shock_index, na.rm = TRUE),  # do this after

    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    shock_index = heart_rate / sbp
  ) |> 
  # replace inf with NAs
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(hospitalization_id), ~ na_if(.x, is.infinite(.x)))) |> 

  # get rid of duplicate rows
  distinct() 

# LAPS2 Score Part 8: Day One Vitals for Cohort

df_laps2_vitals_dayone_prep1 <- 
  df_encounter_laps2_temp1 |> 
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm, dt_24hours_after_admit) |>
  distinct() |> 
  left_join(df_vitals_gcs,
            
            # join only if between the first 24 hours
            by = join_by(hospitalization_id, 
                         dt_24hours_after_admit >= recorded_dttm)
  ) |> 
  
    group_by(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, vital_category) |> 
  # using obs lets you get away with duplicates when going wider and can fix later!
  mutate(obs = row_number()) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, obs, admission_dttm),
    names_from = vital_category,
    values_from = vital_value,
    # names_prefix = "vital_wide_",
    # values_fill = NA
  ) |>
  
  #fixing temp 
  mutate(temp = (temp_c * (9/5)) + 32) |> 
  
  #renaming resp
  rename(resp = respiratory_rate) |> 

  # Quick min/max for duplicates at the SAME time
  dplyr::select(-obs) |> 

  distinct() 

# find the duplicates by day
df_laps2_vitals_dayone_prep2 <- df_laps2_vitals_dayone_prep1 |>
  arrange(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm) |>
  
  # filter out those without a recorded_dttm so we don't add a date later
  filter(!is.na(recorded_dttm)) |> 
  
  # if we make "lab_date" the encounter date... then we are switching all labs within 24hr of admission to the "day 1" in a sneaky fashion
  #using encounter admit date to collect everything together
  mutate(vital_date = date(admission_dttm)) |> 
  group_by(hospitalization_id, vital_date) |>
  # mutate(n = n()) |>
  # filter(n > 1) |>
  summarise(
    temp                = fmin(temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    sbp                 = fmin(sbp, na.rm = TRUE),
    spo2                = fmin(spo2, na.rm = TRUE),
    heart_rate          = fmax(heart_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    resp                = fmax(resp, na.rm = TRUE),
    gcs                 = fmax(gcs, na.rm = TRUE),
    # shock_index         = fmax(shock_index, na.rm = TRUE),  # do this after

    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    shock_index         = heart_rate / sbp
  ) |> 
  
  # replace inf with NAs
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !c(hospitalization_id), ~ na_if(.x, is.infinite(.x)))) |> 

  # get rid of duplicate rows
  distinct() 

# switch out the day 1 stuff 
df_laps2_vitals_final <- df_laps2_vitals_prep2 |> anti_join(df_laps2_vitals_dayone_prep2 |> 
                              dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, vital_date)) |> 
  bind_rows(df_laps2_vitals_dayone_prep2) |> 
  arrange(hospitalization_id, vital_date) |> 
  
  # drop rows with no recorded date
  filter(!is.na(vital_date))


# LAPS 2 Score Part 9: Calculate Laps2 Score

setDT(df_pre_laps_final)
df_pre_laps_final_cohort <- df_pre_laps_final[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id]

df_laps_calc <- df_laps2_final |> 
  # get same naming for date
  rename(recorded_date = lab_date) |> 
  full_join(df_laps2_vitals_final |> 
              rename(recorded_date = vital_date),
            join_by(hospitalization_id, recorded_date)
            ) |> 
  full_join(df_pre_laps_final_cohort)
  
clif_laps2_scores <- df_laps_calc |> 
  group_by(hospitalization_id, recorded_date) |> 
  
  mutate(laps2 = 0) |> 
  
  mutate(
    # lactic_acid and pH 
    laps2 = fcase(
      
      # missing data
      is.na(ph_arterial)  & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 0,
      is.na(ph_arterial)  & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 15,
      is.na(ph_arterial)  & lactic_acid < 2    & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 0,
      is.na(ph_arterial)  & lactic_acid < 2    & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 12,
      is.na(ph_arterial)  & lactic_acid >= 2   & lactic_acid < 4    & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 12,
      is.na(ph_arterial)  & lactic_acid >= 2   & lactic_acid < 4    & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 15,
      is.na(ph_arterial)  & lactic_acid >= 4   & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 26,
      is.na(ph_arterial)  & lactic_acid >= 4   & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 30,
      ph_arterial < 7.2   & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 13,
      ph_arterial < 7.2   & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 19,
      ph_arterial >= 7.2  & ph_arterial < 7.35 & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 5,
      ph_arterial >= 7.2  & ph_arterial < 7.35 & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 15,
      ph_arterial >= 7.35 & ph_arterial < 7.45 & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 0,
      ph_arterial >= 7.35 & ph_arterial < 7.45 & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 12,
      ph_arterial >= 7.45 & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 12,
      ph_arterial >= 7.45 & is.na(lactic_acid) & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 15,

      # complete data
      ph_arterial < 7.2 &   lactic_acid <  2, laps2 + 13,
      ph_arterial < 7.2 &   lactic_acid >= 2 & lactic_acid <  4, laps2 + 19,
      ph_arterial < 7.2 &   lactic_acid >= 4, laps2 + 34,
      ph_arterial >= 7.2 &  ph_arterial < 7.35 & lactic_acid <  2, laps2 + 5,
      ph_arterial >= 7.2 &  ph_arterial < 7.35 & lactic_acid >= 2 & lactic_acid < 4, laps2 + 15,
      ph_arterial >= 7.2 &  ph_arterial < 7.35 & lactic_acid >= 4, laps2 + 25,
      ph_arterial >= 7.35 & ph_arterial < 7.45 & lactic_acid <  2, laps2 + 0,
      ph_arterial >= 7.35 & ph_arterial < 7.45 & lactic_acid >= 2 & lactic_acid < 4, laps2 + 12,
      ph_arterial >= 7.35 & ph_arterial < 7.45 & lactic_acid >= 4, laps2 + 26,
      ph_arterial >= 7.45 & lactic_acid <  2, laps2 + 12,
      ph_arterial >= 7.45 & lactic_acid >= 2   & lactic_acid <  4, laps2 + 15,
      ph_arterial >= 7.45 & lactic_acid >= 4, laps2 + 30,
      default                                                                       = laps2
      ),
    
    # Sodium
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(sodium), laps2 + 0,
      sodium <  129, laps2 + 14,
      sodium >= 129 & sodium < 135, laps2 + 7,
      sodium >= 135 & sodium < 146, laps2 + 0,
      sodium >= 146, laps2 + 4,
      default = laps2
    ),
    
    # Bilirubin
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(bilirubin_total), laps2 + 0,
      bilirubin_total <  2, laps2 + 0,
      bilirubin_total >= 2 & bilirubin_total < 3, laps2 + 11,
      bilirubin_total >= 3 & bilirubin_total < 5, laps2 + 18,
      bilirubin_total >= 5 & bilirubin_total < 8, laps2 + 25,
      bilirubin_total >= 8, laps2 + 41,
      TRUE , laps2
    ),
    
    # BUN
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(bun), laps2 + 0,
      bun < 18, laps2 + 0,
      bun >= 18 & bun < 20, laps2 + 11,
      bun >= 20 & bun < 40, laps2 + 12,
      bun >= 40 & bun < 80, laps2 + 20,
      bun >= 80, laps2 + 25,
      default = laps2
    ),
    
    # Creatinine
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(creatinine), laps2 + 0,
      creatinine < 1, laps2 + 0,
      creatinine >= 1 & creatinine < 2, laps2 + 6,
      creatinine >= 2 & creatinine < 4, laps2 + 11,
      creatinine >= 4, laps2 + 5,
      default = laps2
    ),
    
    # BUN/Cr Ratio
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(bun_cr_ratio), laps2 + 0,
      bun_cr_ratio < 25, laps2 + 0,
      bun_cr_ratio >= 25, laps2 + 10,
      default = laps2
    ),
    
    # Albumin
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(albumin), laps2 + 0,
      albumin < 2, laps2 + 31,
      albumin >= 2 & albumin < 2.5, laps2 + 15,
      albumin >= 2.5, laps2 + 0,
      default = laps2
    ),
    
    # glucose_serum
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(glucose_serum), laps2 + 0,
      glucose_serum < 40, laps2 + 10,
      glucose_serum >= 40 & glucose_serum < 60, laps2 + 10,
      glucose_serum >= 60 & glucose_serum < 200, laps2 + 0,
      glucose_serum >= 200, laps2 + 3,
      default                                                                   = laps2
    ),
    
    # Hematocrit (Hct)
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(hematocrit), laps2 + 0,
      hematocrit < 20, laps2 + 7,
      hematocrit >= 20 & hematocrit < 40, laps2 + 8,
      hematocrit >= 40 & hematocrit < 50, laps2 + 0,
      hematocrit >= 50, laps2 + 3,
      default = laps2
    ),
    
    # WBC
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(wbc) & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 0,
      is.na(wbc) & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 32,
      wbc < 5, laps2 + 8,
      wbc >= 5 & wbc < 13, laps2 + 0,
      wbc >= 13, laps2 + 11,
      default = laps2
    ),
    
  # pco2_arterial
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(pco2_arterial), laps2 + 0,
      pco2_arterial < 35, laps2 + 7,
      pco2_arterial >= 35 & pco2_arterial < 45, laps2 + 0,
      pco2_arterial >= 45 & pco2_arterial < 55, laps2 + 11,
      pco2_arterial >= 55 & pco2_arterial < 65, laps2 + 13,
      pco2_arterial >= 65, laps2 + 12,
      default = laps2
    ),
  
  # po2_arterial
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(po2_arterial), laps2 + 0,
      po2_arterial < 50, laps2 + 8,
      po2_arterial >= 50 & po2_arterial < 120, laps2 + 0,
      po2_arterial >= 120, laps2 + 12,
      default = laps2
    ),
  
  # Troponin
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(troponin)  & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 0,
      is.na(troponin)  & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 9,
      troponin <  0.01, laps2 + 0,
      troponin >= 0.01 & troponin < 0.2, laps2 + 8,
      troponin >= 0.2  & troponin < 1, laps2 + 17,
      troponin >= 1    & troponin < 3, laps2 + 19,
      troponin >= 3, laps2 + 25,
      default = laps2
    ),
  
  # Temp
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(temp), laps2 + 0,
      temp < 96, laps2 + 20,
      temp >= 96    & temp < 100.5, laps2 + 0,
      temp >= 100.5, laps2 + 3,
      default = laps2
    ),

  # heart_rate
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(heart_rate), laps2 + 0,
      heart_rate < 60, laps2 + 7,
      heart_rate >= 60  & heart_rate < 110, laps2 + 0,
      heart_rate >= 110 & heart_rate < 140, laps2 + 7,
      heart_rate >= 140, laps2 + 10,
      default = laps2
    ),
  
  # Resp
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(resp), laps2 + 0,
      resp < 20, laps2 + 0,
      resp >= 20 & resp < 30, laps2 + 11,
      resp >= 30, laps2 + 21,
      default = laps2
    ),
    
  # SBP
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(sbp), laps2 + 0,
      sbp < 75, laps2 + 22,
      sbp >= 75  & sbp < 90, laps2 + 13,
      sbp >= 90  & sbp < 120, laps2 + 5,
      sbp >= 120 & sbp < 140, laps2 + 0,
      sbp >= 140 & sbp < 160, laps2 + 8,
      sbp >= 160, laps2 + 14,
      default = laps2
    ),
  
  # Shock
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(shock_index), laps2 + 0,
      shock_index < 0.65, laps2 + 0,
      shock_index >= 0.65 & shock_index < 0.85, laps2 + 8,
      shock_index >= 0.85, laps2 + 17,
      default = laps2
    ),
  
  # O2Sat
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(spo2) & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 0,
      is.na(spo2) & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 22,
      spo2 <  90, laps2 + 22,
      spo2 >= 90  & spo2 < 94, laps2 + 12,
      spo2 >  94, laps2 + 0,
      default = laps2
    ),
  
  # Neuro (GCS)
    laps2 = fcase(
      is.na(gcs) & high_risk == 0 , laps2 + 16,
      is.na(gcs) & high_risk == 1 , laps2 + 21,
      gcs == 1, laps2 + 0,
      gcs == 2, laps2 + 16,
      gcs == 3, laps2 + 21,
      gcs == 4, laps2 + 36,
      default = laps2
    )
  )


# LAPS2 Score Final:

final_cohort_imv_runs[, imv_date := as.Date(begin_imv)]
setDT(clif_laps2_scores)

# Step 1: Prioritize Exact Match of imv_date and recorded_date
exact_match <- merge(
  final_cohort_imv_runs,
  clif_laps2_scores,
  by.x = c("hospitalization_id", "imv_date"),
  by.y = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_date"),
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Step 2: For unmatched rows, do rolling join with preference for earlier dates
unmatched <- exact_match[is.na(high_risk)]  

# Join using rolling method (prefer earlier)
setkey(clif_laps2_scores, hospitalization_id, recorded_date)
setkey(unmatched, hospitalization_id, imv_date)

roll_join <- clif_laps2_scores[unmatched, roll = -Inf, on = .(hospitalization_id, recorded_date = imv_date)]

# Final: Combine the matched and rolled
final_cohort_imv_runs_merge <- rbindlist(list(
  exact_match[!is.na(high_risk)],
  roll_join
), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

#LAPS2 MISSING DATA SUMMARY 

# Step 1: Flag hospitalizations missing data for each SOFA component
laps2_missing_summary <- final_cohort_imv_runs_merge %>%
  group_by(hospitalization_id) %>%
  summarise(
    missing_sodium = all(is.na(sodium)),
    missing_bili = all(is.na(bilirubin_total)),
    missing_bun = all(is.na(bun)),
    missing_creat = all(is.na(creatinine)),
    missing_bun_cr_ratio = all(is.na(bun_cr_ratio)),
    missing_albumin = all(is.na(albumin)),
    missing_gluc = all(is.na(glucose_serum)),
    missing_hct = all(is.na(hematocrit)),
    missing_wbc = all(is.na(wbc)),
    missing_pco2 = all(is.na(pco2_arterial)),
    missing_po2 = all(is.na(po2_arterial)),
    missing_trop = all(is.na(troponin)),
    missing_temp = all(is.na(temp)),
    missing_hr = all(is.na(heart_rate)),
    missing_resp = all(is.na(resp)),
    missing_sbp = all(is.na(sbp)),
    missing_shock_index = all(is.na(shock_index)),
    missing_spo2 = all(is.na(spo2)),
    missing_gcs = all(is.na(gcs)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Step 2: Calculate percent missing
laps2_missing_percent <- laps2_missing_summary %>%
  summarise(
    pct_missing_sodium = mean(missing_sodium) * 100,
    pct_missing_bili = mean(missing_bili) * 100,
    pct_missing_bun = mean(missing_bun) * 100,
    pct_missing_creat = mean(missing_creat) * 100,
    pct_missing_bun_cr_ratio = mean(missing_bun_cr_ratio) * 100,
    pct_missing_albumin = mean(missing_albumin) * 100,
    pct_missing_gluc = mean(missing_gluc) * 100,
    pct_missing_hct = mean(missing_hct) * 100,
    pct_missing_wbc = mean(missing_wbc) * 100,
    pct_missing_pco2 = mean(missing_pco2) * 100,
    pct_missing_po2 = mean(missing_po2) * 100,
    pct_missing_trop = mean(missing_trop) * 100,
    pct_missing_temp = mean(missing_temp) * 100,
    pct_missing_hr = mean(missing_hr) * 100,
    pct_missing_resp = mean(missing_resp) * 100,
    pct_missing_sbp = mean(missing_sbp) * 100,
    pct_missing_shock_index = mean(missing_shock_index) * 100,
    pct_missing_spo2 = mean(missing_spo2) * 100,
    pct_missing_gcs = mean(missing_gcs) * 100
  )

final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced <- final_cohort_imv_runs_merge[, .(hospitalization_id, patient_id, begin_imv, end_imv, imv_duration_hours_final, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm, icu_admission_dttm, death_dttm, hospital_id, icu_imv, hospital_icu_id, location_of_intubation, first_location_category, age_at_admission, age_category, admission_type_category, discharge_category, sex_category, race_category, ethnicity_category, ethnicity_category_final, SVM_SCORE, language_category, top_five_non_eng_non_spanish, non_eng, three_language_cat, elixhauser_score, weight_kg, admission_height, bmi, trached, reintubation_final, mortality_28day, death_during_admission, hospital_free_days_6mo, hospital_free_days_28, icu_free_days_28, vent_free_days_28, laps2, deep_sedation_weighted, deep_sedation_unweighted, rass_weighted_avg, rass_below_minus_3_count, median_rass_binary, median_rass_cont, sedation_index_score, rass_frequency_hrs, time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours)]

# Save the Missing results to a file
fwrite(laps2_missing_percent, file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_laps2_missing_percentages.csv")))

#Save Point
write_parquet(final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced, paste0(intermediate_dir, "cleaned_cohort_w_laps", institution, ".parquet"))
```

# PART FIVE: Calculate Med Doses in First 48 hours
```{r}
#Save Point Code if need to re-run and don't want to re-run LAPS2 can simply run parts 0-3 to upload tables/directories then remove # before code below and start here.
#final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced <- read_parquet(paste0(intermediate_dir, "cleaned_cohort_w_laps", institution, ".parquet"))


# Propofol
propofol_cont <- meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "propofol"]
propofol_int <- intermittent_meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "propofol"]
propofol_combined <- merge(propofol_cont, propofol_int, by = c("hospitalization_id", "admin_dttm", "med_dose", "med_dose_unit", "med_category", "med_group", "med_route_category"), all = TRUE)

propofol_expanded <- merge(propofol_combined, final_cohort_imv_runs, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
propofol_expanded <- propofol_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
#propofol_expanded <- propofol_expanded[!mar_action_name == "missed"]

DTprop <- copy(propofol_expanded)

DTprop[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
DTprop[, end_imv   := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
DTprop[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]

# normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
DTprop[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]

DTprop[, `:=`(
  start_grace = begin_imv - 60*60,
  end_48h     = begin_imv + 48*60*60
)]

# If end_imv is earlier than begin_imv+48h, cap window there; otherwise use begin_imv+48h
DTprop[, window_end := fifelse(
  !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
  end_imv,
  end_48h
)]
#########################################
# Split infusion vs push
# ---------------------------
inf  <- DTprop[med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg/min"]
setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
push <- DTprop[med_dose_unit %in% c("mg", "mcg")]
push[, push_dose_mg := fifelse(
  med_dose_unit == "mcg",
  med_dose / 1000,
  med_dose
)]

# ---------------------------
# PUSH: mg doses within 48h
# ---------------------------
push_48 <- push[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end & !is.na(push_dose_mg),
  .(push_mg_48h = sum(push_dose_mg, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# ---------------------------
# INFUSION timeline
# ---------------------------
baseline_rows <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
  .SD[.N],
  by = hospitalization_id
][
  , admin_dttm := begin_imv
]

inf_0_48 <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
]

inf2 <- rbindlist(list(inf_0_48, baseline_rows), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]

inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(is.na(next_admin_dttm), window_end, pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end))]
inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]

# convert infusion rate
inf2[, propofol_rate_mcg_min := med_dose * weight_kg]

inf2[, infusion_mg := (propofol_rate_mcg_min * duration_min) / 1000]

inf_48 <- inf2[
  duration_min > 0 & !is.na(propofol_rate_mcg_min),
  .(
    infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
    infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# zero out infusion dose if < 60 minutes total infusion time
inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]

# ---------------------------
# Combine push + infusion
# ---------------------------
propofol_total_48h <- merge(inf_48, push_48, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

propofol_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mg_48h), infusion_mg_48h := 0]
propofol_total_48h[is.na(push_mg_48h), push_mg_48h := 0]

propofol_total_48h[, propofol_total_mg_48 := infusion_mg_48h + push_mg_48h]
propofol_total_48h <- propofol_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, propofol_total_mg_48)]

# Convert back to hourly rate
propofol_total_48h <- merge(
  propofol_total_48h,
  final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(hospitalization_id, imv_duration_hours_final, weight_kg)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

#Calculate average infusion rate including boluses
propofol_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
  is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
  imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
  default = imv_duration_hours_final
)]

propofol_total_48h[, propofol_avg_mcgkgmin_48 := (propofol_total_mg_48 * 1000) / (weight_kg * imv_hours_capped * 60)]
propofol_total_48h[weight_kg <= 0 | imv_hours_capped <= 0, propofol_avg_mcgkgmin_48 := NA_real_]
propofol_total_48h <- propofol_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, propofol_total_mg_48, propofol_avg_mcgkgmin_48)]
###############################################################################

#Precedex - don't need to include intermittent
precedex <- meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "dexmedetomidine"]
setorder(precedex, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)

precedex_expanded <- merge(precedex, final_cohort_imv_runs, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
precedex_expanded <- precedex_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
#precedex_expanded <- precedex_expanded[!mar_action_name == "missed"]
precedex_expanded[med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg", med_dose_unit := "mcg/kg/hr"]

DTdex <- copy(precedex_expanded)  

DTdex[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
DTdex[, end_imv   := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
DTdex[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]

# normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
DTdex[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]

DTdex[, `:=`(
  start_grace = begin_imv - 60*60,
  end_48h     = begin_imv + 48*60*60
)]

# If end_imv is earlier than begin_imv+48h, cap window there; otherwise use begin_imv+48h
DTdex[, window_end := fifelse(
  !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
  end_imv,
  end_48h
)]

# ---------------------------
# Split infusion vs push
# ---------------------------
# Precedex infusions are usually mcg/kg/hr (sometimes mcg/kg/min exists in messy MAR data)
inf  <- DTdex[med_dose_unit %in% c("mcg/kg/hr", "mcg/kg/min")]
setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
push <- DTdex[med_dose_unit == "mcg"]

# ---------------------------
# PUSH: mcg doses within 48h
# ---------------------------
push_48 <- push[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end & !is.na(med_dose),
  .(push_mcg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# ---------------------------
# INFUSION timeline (with 1h grace baseline)
# ---------------------------
baseline_rows <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
  .SD[.N],
  by = hospitalization_id
][
  , admin_dttm := begin_imv
]

inf_0_48 <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
]

inf2 <- rbindlist(list(inf_0_48, baseline_rows), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]

# next timestamp + duration
inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(is.na(next_admin_dttm), window_end, pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end))]
inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]

# convert rate to mcg/min depending on unit, then integrate
inf2[, precedex_rate_mcg_min := fifelse(
  med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg/hr",
  (med_dose * weight_kg) / 60,         # mcg/kg/hr -> mcg/hr -> mcg/min
  (med_dose * weight_kg)               # mcg/kg/min -> mcg/min
)]

inf2[, infusion_mcg := precedex_rate_mcg_min * duration_min]

inf_48 <- inf2[
  duration_min > 0 & !is.na(precedex_rate_mcg_min),
  .(
    infusion_mcg_48h = sum(infusion_mcg, na.rm = TRUE),
    infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# zero out infusion dose if < 60 minutes total infusion time
inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mcg_48h := 0]

# ---------------------------
# Combine push + infusion
# ---------------------------
precedex_total_48h <- merge(inf_48, push_48, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

precedex_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mcg_48h), infusion_mcg_48h := 0]
precedex_total_48h[is.na(push_mcg_48h),    push_mcg_48h := 0]

precedex_total_48h[, dexmedetomidine_total_cont_48 := infusion_mcg_48h + push_mcg_48h]
precedex_total_48h <- precedex_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, dexmedetomidine_total_cont_48)]

# Convert back to hourly rate
precedex_total_48h <- merge(
  precedex_total_48h,
  final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(hospitalization_id, imv_duration_hours_final, weight_kg)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Calculate average infusion rate including boluses
precedex_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
  is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
  imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
  default = imv_duration_hours_final
)]

precedex_total_48h[, dexmedetomidine_avg_mcgkghr_48 := dexmedetomidine_total_cont_48 / (weight_kg * imv_hours_capped)]
precedex_total_48h[weight_kg <= 0 | imv_hours_capped <= 0, dexmedetomidine_avg_mcgkghr_48 := NA_real_]

precedex_total_48h <- precedex_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, dexmedetomidine_total_cont_48,
                                             dexmedetomidine_avg_mcgkghr_48)]

####################################################
# Fentanyl
fentanyl_cont <- meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "fentanyl"]
#setorder(fentanyl, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
fentanyl_int <- intermittent_meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "fentanyl"]

fentanyl_combined <- merge(fentanyl_cont, fentanyl_int, by = c("hospitalization_id", "admin_dttm", "med_dose", "med_dose_unit", "med_category", "med_group", "med_route_category"), all = TRUE)

fentanyl_expanded <- merge(fentanyl_combined, final_cohort_imv_runs, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
fentanyl_expanded <- fentanyl_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
#fentanyl_expanded <- fentanyl_expanded[!mar_action_name == "missed"]
#fentanyl_expanded <- fentanyl_expanded[
#  !(med_dose_unit == "mcg" & mar_action_name != "bolus")
#]
fentanyl_expanded <- fentanyl_expanded[!med_dose_unit == "mcg/min"]
fentanyl_expanded[med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg/hr", med_dose_unit := "mcg/kg"]

DTfent <- copy(fentanyl_expanded)   # <- your table name

DTfent[, begin_imv  := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
DTfent[, end_imv    := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
DTfent[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]

# normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
DTfent[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]


DTfent[, `:=`(
  start_grace = begin_imv - 60*60,
  end_48h     = begin_imv + 48*60*60
)]

DTfent[, window_end := fifelse(!is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h, end_imv, end_48h)]

# ---------------------------
# Split infusion vs bolus
# ---------------------------
inf   <- DTfent[med_dose_unit == "mcg/hr"]
setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
bolus <- DTfent[med_dose_unit == "mcg"]

# ---------------------------
# BOLUS: mcg doses within window
# ---------------------------
bolus_48 <- bolus[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end & !is.na(med_dose),
  .(bolus_mcg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# ---------------------------
# INFUSION timeline (with 1h grace baseline)
# ---------------------------
baseline_rows <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
  .SD[.N],
  by = hospitalization_id
][
  , admin_dttm := begin_imv
]

inf_0_win <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
]

inf2 <- rbindlist(list(inf_0_win, baseline_rows), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]

# intervals
inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(is.na(next_admin_dttm), window_end, pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end))]
inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]

# integrate: mcg/hr -> mcg/min -> mcg
inf2[, fent_rate_mcg_min := med_dose / 60]
inf2[, infusion_mcg := fent_rate_mcg_min * duration_min]

inf_48 <- inf2[
  duration_min > 0 & !is.na(fent_rate_mcg_min),
  .(
    infusion_mcg_48h = sum(infusion_mcg, na.rm = TRUE),
    infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# only count infusion if >= 60 minutes
inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mcg_48h := 0]

# ---------------------------
# Combine infusion + bolus
# ---------------------------
fentanyl_total_48h <- merge(inf_48, bolus_48, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

fentanyl_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mcg_48h), infusion_mcg_48h := 0]
fentanyl_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mcg_48h),   bolus_mcg_48h := 0]
fentanyl_total_48h[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]  # optional

fentanyl_total_48h[, fentanyl_total_mcg_48 := infusion_mcg_48h + bolus_mcg_48h]

fentanyl_total_48h <- fentanyl_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, fentanyl_total_mcg_48)]

fentanyl_total_48h[, fentanyl_total_mme_48 := fentanyl_total_mcg_48 * 0.1]


# Merge in duration
fentanyl_total_48h <- merge(
  fentanyl_total_48h,
  final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(hospitalization_id, imv_duration_hours_final)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Cap at 48h
fentanyl_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
  is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
  imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
  default = imv_duration_hours_final
)]

# Average mcg/hr
fentanyl_total_48h[, fentanyl_avg_mcghr_48 := fentanyl_total_mcg_48 / imv_hours_capped]
fentanyl_total_48h[imv_hours_capped <= 0, fentanyl_avg_mcghr_48 := NA_real_]

fentanyl_total_48h <- fentanyl_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, fentanyl_total_mcg_48,
                                                       fentanyl_total_mme_48, fentanyl_avg_mcghr_48)]

#Receipt of Infusion
cont_fent_receipt <- unique(inf_48[infusion_mcg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)])
cont_fent_receipt[, cont_fent_receipt := 1]

###############################################################################
# Hydromorphone
hydromorphone_cont <- meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "hydromorphone"]
#setorder(hydromorphone, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
hydromorphone_int <- intermittent_meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "hydromorphone"]

hydromorphone_combined <- merge(hydromorphone_cont, hydromorphone_int, by = c("hospitalization_id", "admin_dttm", "med_dose", "med_dose_unit", "med_category", "med_group", "med_route_category"), all = TRUE)

hydromorphone_expanded <- merge(hydromorphone_combined, final_cohort_imv_runs, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
hydromorphone_expanded <- hydromorphone_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]

DThydro <- copy(hydromorphone_expanded)

DThydro[, begin_imv  := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
DThydro[, end_imv    := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
DThydro[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]

# normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
DThydro[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]

DThydro[, `:=`(
  start_grace = begin_imv - 60*60,
  end_48h     = begin_imv + 48*60*60
)]

DThydro[, window_end := fifelse(!is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h, end_imv, end_48h)]

# ---------------------------
# Split infusion vs bolus
# ---------------------------
inf   <- DThydro[med_dose_unit == "mg/hr"]
setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
bolus <- DThydro[med_dose_unit == "mg"]

# ---------------------------
# BOLUS mg within window
# ---------------------------
# Convert any oral doses to IV equivalent for MME calculations later
bolus[, hydromorphone_iv_equiv_mg := fcase(
  med_route_category == "iv",      med_dose,
  med_route_category == "enteral", med_dose / 5,
  default = med_dose
)]

bolus_48 <- bolus[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end & !is.na(hydromorphone_iv_equiv_mg),
  .(bolus_mg_48h = sum(hydromorphone_iv_equiv_mg, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# ---------------------------
# INFUSION timeline
# ---------------------------

baseline_rows <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
  .SD[.N],
  by = hospitalization_id
][
  , admin_dttm := begin_imv
]

inf_0_win <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
]

inf2 <- rbindlist(list(inf_0_win, baseline_rows), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]

# interval durations
inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(is.na(next_admin_dttm), window_end, pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end))]
inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]

# integrate infusion mg/hr -> mg/min -> mg
inf2[, hydromorphone_rate_mg_min := med_dose / 60]
inf2[, infusion_mg := hydromorphone_rate_mg_min * duration_min]

inf_48 <- inf2[
  duration_min > 0 & !is.na(hydromorphone_rate_mg_min),
  .(
    infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
    infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# require >=60 minutes infusion
inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]

# ---------------------------
# Combine infusion + bolus
# ---------------------------
hydromorphone_total_48h <- merge(inf_48, bolus_48, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

hydromorphone_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mg_48h), infusion_mg_48h := 0]
hydromorphone_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mg_48h), bolus_mg_48h := 0]

hydromorphone_total_48h[, hydromorphone_total_48 := infusion_mg_48h + bolus_mg_48h]

hydromorphone_total_48h <- hydromorphone_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, hydromorphone_total_48)]

#Add MME for hydromorphone
hydromorphone_total_48h[, hydromorphone_total_mme_48 := hydromorphone_total_48 * 20]

# Merge in duration
hydromorphone_total_48h <- merge(
  hydromorphone_total_48h,
  final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(hospitalization_id, imv_duration_hours_final)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Cap at 48h
hydromorphone_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
  is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
  imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
  default = imv_duration_hours_final
)]

# Average mg/hr
hydromorphone_total_48h[, hydromorphone_avg_mghr_48 := hydromorphone_total_48 / imv_hours_capped]
hydromorphone_total_48h[imv_hours_capped <= 0, hydromorphone_avg_mghr_48 := NA_real_]

hydromorphone_total_48h <- hydromorphone_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, hydromorphone_total_48,
                                                       hydromorphone_total_mme_48, hydromorphone_avg_mghr_48)]

#Receipt of Infusion
cont_hydro_receipt <- unique(inf_48[infusion_mg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)])
cont_hydro_receipt[, cont_hydro_receipt := 1]

################################################################################
# Morphine
morphine_cont <- meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "morphine"]
morphine_int <- intermittent_meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "morphine"]
morphine_combined <- merge(morphine_cont, morphine_int, by = c("hospitalization_id", "admin_dttm", "med_dose", "med_dose_unit", "med_category", "med_group", "med_route_category"), all = TRUE)
setorder(morphine_combined, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)

morphine_expanded <- merge(morphine_combined, final_cohort_imv_runs, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

morphine_expanded <- morphine_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]

DTmorphine <- copy(morphine_expanded)

DTmorphine[, begin_imv  := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
DTmorphine[, end_imv    := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
DTmorphine[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]

# normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
DTmorphine[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]

DTmorphine[, `:=`(
  start_grace = begin_imv - 60*60,
  end_48h     = begin_imv + 48*60*60
)]

DTmorphine[, window_end := fifelse(!is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h, end_imv, end_48h)]

# ---------------------------
# Split infusion vs bolus
# ---------------------------
inf   <- DTmorphine[med_dose_unit == "mg/hr"]
setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
bolus <- DTmorphine[med_dose_unit == "mg"]

# ---------------------------
# BOLUS: mg within window
# ---------------------------
bolus_48 <- bolus[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end & !is.na(med_dose),
  .(bolus_mg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# ---------------------------
# INFUSION timeline (with 1h grace baseline)
# ---------------------------

baseline_rows <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
  .SD[.N],
  by = hospitalization_id
][
  , admin_dttm := begin_imv
]

inf_0_win <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
]

inf2 <- rbindlist(list(inf_0_win, baseline_rows), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# if multiple rows at the same timestamp, keep the last one
setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]

# intervals
inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(is.na(next_admin_dttm), window_end, pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end))]
inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]

# integrate: mg/hr -> mg/min -> mg
inf2[, morphine_rate_mg_min := med_dose / 60]
inf2[, infusion_mg := morphine_rate_mg_min * duration_min]

inf_48 <- inf2[
  duration_min > 0 & !is.na(morphine_rate_mg_min),
  .(
    infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
    infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# require >=60 minutes infusion
inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]

# ---------------------------
# Combine infusion + bolus
# ---------------------------
morphine_total_48h <- merge(inf_48, bolus_48, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

morphine_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mg_48h), infusion_mg_48h := 0]
morphine_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mg_48h),   bolus_mg_48h := 0]
morphine_total_48h[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]  # optional

morphine_total_48h[, morphine_total_48 := infusion_mg_48h + bolus_mg_48h]
morphine_total_48h <- morphine_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, morphine_total_48)]

morphine_total_48h[, morphine_total_mme_48 := morphine_total_48]

# Merge in duration
morphine_total_48h <- merge(
  morphine_total_48h,
  final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(hospitalization_id, imv_duration_hours_final)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Cap at 48h
morphine_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
  is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
  imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
  default = imv_duration_hours_final
)]

# Average mg/hr
morphine_total_48h[, morphine_avg_mghr_48 := morphine_total_48 / imv_hours_capped]
morphine_total_48h[imv_hours_capped <= 0, morphine_avg_mghr_48 := NA_real_]

morphine_total_48h <- morphine_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, morphine_total_48,
                                             morphine_total_mme_48,
                                             morphine_avg_mghr_48)]

#Receipt of Infusion
cont_morphine_receipt <- unique(inf_48[infusion_mg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)])
cont_morphine_receipt[, cont_morphine_receipt := 1]

###############################################################################

# Remifentanil
remifentanil <- meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "remifentanil"]
setorder(remifentanil, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)

remifentanil_expanded <- merge(remifentanil, final_cohort_imv_runs, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
remifentanil_expanded <- remifentanil_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
#remifentanil_expanded <- remifentanil_expanded[!mar_action_name == "missed"]
#remifentanil_expanded <- remifentanil_expanded[
#  !(med_dose_unit == "mcg" & mar_action_name != "bolus")
#]

DTremi <- copy(remifentanil_expanded)  

DTremi[, begin_imv  := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
DTremi[, end_imv    := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
DTremi[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]

# normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
DTremi[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]

DTremi[, `:=`(
  start_grace = begin_imv - 60*60,
  end_48h     = begin_imv + 48*60*60
)]

DTremi[, window_end := fifelse(!is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h, end_imv, end_48h)]

# ---------------------------
# Split infusion vs bolus
# ---------------------------
inf   <- DTremi[med_dose_unit %in% c("mcg/kg/min", "mcg/kg/hr")]  # include hr just in case
setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
bolus <- DTremi[med_dose_unit == "mcg"]  # if present

# ---------------------------
# BOLUS: mcg doses within window
# ---------------------------
bolus_48 <- bolus[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end & !is.na(med_dose),
  .(bolus_mcg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# ---------------------------
# INFUSION timeline (with 1h grace baseline)
# ---------------------------
baseline_rows <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
  .SD[.N],
  by = hospitalization_id
][
  , admin_dttm := begin_imv
]

inf_0_win <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
]

inf2 <- rbindlist(list(inf_0_win, baseline_rows), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]

# intervals
inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(is.na(next_admin_dttm), window_end, pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end))]
inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]

# convert to mcg/min, then integrate to mcg
inf2[, remi_rate_mcg_min := fifelse(
  med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg/hr",
  (med_dose * weight_kg) / 60,     # mcg/kg/hr -> mcg/hr -> mcg/min
  (med_dose * weight_kg)           # mcg/kg/min -> mcg/min
)]

inf2[, infusion_mcg := remi_rate_mcg_min * duration_min]

inf_48 <- inf2[
  duration_min > 0 & !is.na(remi_rate_mcg_min),
  .(
    infusion_mcg_48h = sum(infusion_mcg, na.rm = TRUE),
    infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# only count infusion if >= 60 minutes
inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mcg_48h := 0]

# ---------------------------
# Combine infusion + bolus
# ---------------------------
remifentanil_total_48h <- merge(inf_48, bolus_48, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

remifentanil_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mcg_48h), infusion_mcg_48h := 0]
remifentanil_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mcg_48h),   bolus_mcg_48h := 0]
remifentanil_total_48h[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]  # optional

remifentanil_total_48h[, remifentanil_total_48 := infusion_mcg_48h + bolus_mcg_48h]
remifentanil_total_48h <- remifentanil_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, remifentanil_total_48)]


# Merge in duration
remifentanil_total_48h <- merge(
  remifentanil_total_48h,
  final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(hospitalization_id, imv_duration_hours_final)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Calculate average infusion rate including boluses
# Cap IMV duration at 48h
remifentanil_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
  is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
  imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
  default = imv_duration_hours_final
)]

# Average rate including boluses
remifentanil_total_48h[, remifentanil_avg_mcgkgmin_48 := remifentanil_total_48 / (imv_hours_capped * 60)]
remifentanil_total_48h[imv_hours_capped <= 0, remifentanil_avg_mcgkgmin_48 := NA_real_]

remifentanil_total_48h <- remifentanil_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, remifentanil_total_48,
                                                     remifentanil_avg_mcgkgmin_48)]
remifentanil_total_48h[, remifentanil_total_mme_48 := remifentanil_total_48 * 0.1]

#Receipt of Infusion
cont_remi_receipt <- unique(inf_48[infusion_mcg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)])
cont_remi_receipt[, cont_remi_receipt := 1]
################################################################################

#Midazolam
midazolam_cont <- meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "midazolam"]
midazolam_int <- intermittent_meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "midazolam"]
midazolam_combined <- merge(midazolam_cont, midazolam_int, by = c("hospitalization_id", "admin_dttm", "med_dose", "med_dose_unit", "med_category", "med_group", "med_route_category"), all = TRUE)
setorder(midazolam_combined, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)

midazolam_expanded <- merge(midazolam_combined, final_cohort_imv_runs, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
midazolam_expanded <- midazolam_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]

DTmidaz <- copy(midazolam_expanded)

DTmidaz[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
DTmidaz[, end_imv   := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
DTmidaz[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]

# normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
DTmidaz[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]

DTmidaz[, `:=`(
  start_grace = begin_imv - 60*60,
  end_48h     = begin_imv + 48*60*60
)]

# If end_imv is earlier than begin_imv+48h, cap window there; otherwise use begin_imv+48h
DTmidaz[, window_end := fifelse(
  !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
  end_imv,
  end_48h
)]

# ---------------------------
# Split infusion vs bolus
# ---------------------------
inf  <- DTmidaz[med_dose_unit == "mg/hr"]
setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
bolus <- DTmidaz[med_dose_unit == "mg"]   # bolus rows

# ---------------------------
# BOLUS: mg doses within 48h
# ---------------------------
bolus_48 <- bolus[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end & !is.na(med_dose),
  .(bolus_mg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# ---------------------------
# INFUSION timeline (with 1h grace baseline)
# ---------------------------
baseline_rows <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
  .SD[.N],
  by = hospitalization_id
][
  , admin_dttm := begin_imv
]

inf_0_48 <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
]

inf2 <- rbindlist(list(inf_0_48, baseline_rows), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]

# durations
inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(is.na(next_admin_dttm), window_end, pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end))]
inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]

# integrate: mg/hr -> mg/min -> mg
inf2[, midaz_rate_mg_min := med_dose / 60]
inf2[, infusion_mg := midaz_rate_mg_min * duration_min]

inf_48 <- inf2[
  duration_min > 0 & !is.na(midaz_rate_mg_min),
  .(
    infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
    infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# zero out infusion dose if < 60 minutes total infusion time
inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]

# ---------------------------
# Combine infusion + bolus
# ---------------------------
midazolam_total_48h <- merge(inf_48, bolus_48, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

midazolam_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mg_48h), infusion_mg_48h := 0]
midazolam_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mg_48h),   bolus_mg_48h := 0]

midazolam_total_48h[, midaz_total_48 := infusion_mg_48h + bolus_mg_48h]
midazolam_total_48h <- midazolam_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, midaz_total_48)]


# Merge in duration
midazolam_total_48h <- merge(
  midazolam_total_48h,
  final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(hospitalization_id, imv_duration_hours_final)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Cap at 48h
midazolam_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
  is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
  imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
  default = imv_duration_hours_final
)]

# Average mg/hr
midazolam_total_48h[, midazolam_avg_mghr_48 := midaz_total_48 / imv_hours_capped]
midazolam_total_48h[imv_hours_capped <= 0, midazolam_avg_mghr_48 := NA_real_]

midazolam_total_48h <- midazolam_total_48h[, .(hospitalization_id, midaz_total_48,
                                             midazolam_avg_mghr_48)]

#Receipt of Infusion
cont_midaz_receipt <- unique(inf_48[infusion_mg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)])
cont_midaz_receipt[, cont_midaz_receipt := 1]
################################################################################

# Lorazepam

lorazepam_cont <- meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "lorazepam"]
lorazepam_int <- intermittent_meds[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id & med_category == "lorazepam"]
lorazepam_combined <- merge(lorazepam_cont, lorazepam_int, by = c("hospitalization_id", "admin_dttm", "med_dose", "med_dose_unit", "med_category", "med_group", "med_route_category"), all = TRUE)
setorder(lorazepam_combined, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)

lorazepam_expanded <- merge(lorazepam_combined, final_cohort_imv_runs, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
lorazepam_expanded <- lorazepam_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
#lorazepam_expanded <- lorazepam_expanded[!mar_action_name == "missed"]
#lorazepam_expanded <- lorazepam_expanded[
#  !(med_dose_unit == "mg" & mar_action_name != "bolus")
#]

DTloraz <- copy(lorazepam_expanded)  # <- your table name

DTloraz[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
DTloraz[, end_imv   := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
DTloraz[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]

# normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
DTloraz[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]

DTloraz[, `:=`(
  start_grace = begin_imv - 60*60,
  end_48h     = begin_imv + 48*60*60
)]

# If end_imv is earlier than begin_imv+48h, cap window there; otherwise use begin_imv+48h
DTloraz[, window_end := fifelse(
  !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
  end_imv,
  end_48h
)]

# ---------------------------
# Split infusion vs bolus
# ---------------------------
inf  <- DTloraz[med_dose_unit == "mg/hr"]
setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
bolus <- DTloraz[med_dose_unit == "mg"]   # bolus rows

# ---------------------------
# BOLUS: mg doses within 48h
# ---------------------------
bolus_48 <- bolus[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end & !is.na(med_dose),
  .(bolus_mg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# ---------------------------
# INFUSION timeline (with 1h grace baseline)
# ---------------------------

baseline_rows <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
  .SD[.N],
  by = hospitalization_id
][
  , admin_dttm := begin_imv
]

inf_0_48 <- inf[
  admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
]

inf2 <- rbindlist(list(inf_0_48, baseline_rows), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]

# durations
inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(is.na(next_admin_dttm), window_end, pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end))]
inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]

# integrate: mg/hr -> mg/min -> mg
inf2[, loraz_rate_mg_min := med_dose / 60]
inf2[, infusion_mg := loraz_rate_mg_min * duration_min]

inf_48 <- inf2[
  duration_min > 0 & !is.na(loraz_rate_mg_min),
  .(
    infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
    infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# zero out infusion dose if < 60 minutes total infusion time
inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]

# ---------------------------
# Combine infusion + bolus
# ---------------------------
```
